reviews:
Review 1: rating 3.0. Must use two! I like this product but have to explain. Through trial and error I now use 2 seals for one coffee pod. One seal does not withstand the stress of the the coffee process. One seal leads to breaks and leaks coffee grounds. So the product is doubly expensive. Two seals does the job. Review 2: rating 5.0. Good value It ir really good !!! You just have to have patience to remove the original foil and clean the pods. Review 3: rating 5.0. Just the right size for the pods. I just refilled my pods and had my coffee. I am very pleased with the flavor.
I did like that I didn’t have to use scissors to cut out the extra aluminum. Review 4: rating 1.0. Do not buy These are neither sticky enough nor fit well- almost broke our Nespresso Verturo. Review 5: rating 2.0. Now too sticky! I was VERY happy with this product however it appears that they have changed it to be ALOT more sticky. Now the capsules get stuck in my Nespresso (I think the adhesion product is melting into the Nespresso maker) and the capsules stay sticky even after I wash them - please go back to how they were or I may have to change products. Review 6: rating 2.0. Say Goodbye to convenience PRO's
They actually Work ! And quite well
Material expense very low compared to the $1 Nespresso gets per pod
Fairly easy to remove a used foil.
CON's (ya know this was coming)
Your gonna need some accessories (an Exacto knife, soft bristle brush, a spoon for filling & tamping the grounds, some kind of holder for the pods, a matt or tray (coffee will be spilt)
Time consuming to get a successfully filled and covered... Review 7: rating 2.0. Way too small!! These caps are very thin with a very small diameter, requiring precise placement on the pod. I much prefer Recaps, which are thicker and have a larger diameter, thus providing a far greater margin for error. The diameter of these Geesta caps is barely larger than the diameter of the pod itself. In the future I’ll stick with Recaps. Review 8: rating 1.0. Geesta should send me 2 pkg replacements. Have one not opened and 1 pkg half full. The last two packages that I bought the the seals were coming undone in about 2 to 3 days. The adhesive on these seals are not the same as to what I was using and giving High Marks. I have use about 300+ Geesta Seals with almost no problems. All of my reviews were GREAT! I did what some people said. After cleaning my used pods I ran 10 of them through a liquid soap cleaner to degrease them. Very ... Review 9: rating 2.0. An excellent tool providing an option for choosing your favorite coffee Very easy to use, while adding my favorite expresso coffee Review 10: rating 1.0. Not very happy with the Geesta foils... This is my first cup. As you see the top ripped at the center and my cup of coffee is full of grounds. Used an espresso grind and followed directions. I will try one more time before sending these back. Tried the silicone cap things-even worse. Review 11: rating 4.0. Price has almost doubled I would order these again because they work pretty well but the price has almost doubled in the last 6 months. Combined with the fact that you probably won't get 100% use because from my experience, it's easy to slip and puncture the top when you are sealing the edge. If you make enough pod refills for a couple of weeks, the adhesive appears to give up and you end up with several unusable pods even if you are super careful about making sure there are no coffe... Review 12: rating 1.0. Bad quality. Grinds in my coffee I reuse pods all the time and didn’t have this problem till I tried this brand. I get about a tea spoon full of grinds in every cup of coffee. The way the foil rips makes unnecessary space side of hole punched. The lids are also smaller so have to pay attention when applying. I do not recommend. Review 13: rating 2.0. Circumfrence too small I will be using my previous brand again after trying these, They are lighter, thinner, and the circumfrence is a tad too small. These lids are pushed down and into the coffee when the top of the coffee maker is closed. It makes for grounds escaping and coffee splashing onto the cup that holds the capsules, Review 14: rating 5.0. Cost-effective and Environment-friendly This aluminum foil recap is absolutely awesome! I can repack my own coffee in the coffee capsules with those recaps, resulting in saving me a lot of money! This is a must-buy for Nespresso vertuoline owners who want to enjoy cost-effective coffee. Review 15: rating 5.0. Great product for coffee lovers Great product, I’ve been using them for months with my favorite coffee. Initially I made several days at a time but they would unstick around day 2 or 3. Now I just do enough for each day the night before. Review 16: rating 5.0. Nespresso This cap foils are a little too small for vertuoline cups which come off easily when brewing
causing coffee grounds to spill into machine , I’ve also had to use more than one because they don’t fly properly. Review 17: rating 5.0. Very excellent product I love my Nespresso again I honestly was about to throw away my coffee maker due to the fact that it was just really challenging to find a decent prices and VertuoLine pods. They are not available at stores at least not in my area and if you forget to order them you are out of coffee for a while they're very inconvenient the coffee is excellent the expense and the lack of convenience in purchasing them almost cheaper to go to Starbucks.
But Hallelujah afte... Review 18: rating 1.0. Poor Adhesive The adhesive is very weak and drys out so only make a weeks worth of capsules or they will fall apart. Review 19: rating 5.0. Works Great! From my very first attempt this has worked great! I have some Cafe Du Monde given to me as a gift but I do not have a regular coffee pot. I have both a Keurig and a Nespresso Vertuline. I tried to make using the attachment in my Keurig but it did not work and made a mess. The grind on the Cafe Du Monde is a little course so I run it thru my coffee grinder for 10 - 15 seconds. I have tried different aluminum pods and I do notice that it varies depending on the pod so... Review 20: rating 1.0. Dont buy Don't buy if your planning to use for your Nespresso - it doesn't work
persona: This customer values functional, practical solutions for household maintenance and coffee preparation, prefers products that are easy to use with minimal setup, and is willing to accept some inconvenience if the product delivers reliable performance, but tends to switch to more convenient alternatives when available.
reference_output:
rating 4.0. Pod COVERS for using your owqn Coffee I thought we would get a special type of RE-Usable pod cartridge (like can do in others brands) ...but this is ONLY the aluminum covers - STEPS b4 using -
you need to save an old used pod -
then trim (cut) off top -
clean out pod for re-use -
put in your own coffee and pack down-
take a tooth pick and CLEAN off the edges where the new seal goes (or you'll have a "leak" problem)-
best to get someone else to help hold while you apply the new aluminum seal top-
take finger nail and seal around edges better and press down aluminum seal-
NOW you are ready to use - That's all ! :-)
This method WORKS! Just a hassle- a Nespresso marketing thing - I'm sure.
I have re-used the old pods five times (so far) and still OK to re-use. Not sure how long one will last.
They need to make something BETTER !

reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. Reduce landfill, make better coffe, easy to use. I've been using K-cups for a long time. I like being able to make my coffee and not let it sit in the pot for hours. I tried using reusable filters but cleanup was quite the chore. After using paper filter liners the cleanup is a snap. I can buy the coffee I like and it's still cheaper. I've been buying Safeway select k-cups at about $.30 each. Now I can have Folgers for about $.06 each. Heck, I can try out several brands and fi... Review 2: rating 1.0. Doesn’t work ! Bags leak grounds ! Every filter developed a hole in the bottom and leaked grounds Review 3: rating 5.0. Excellent filters These filters are a little deeper than the other brand I’ve used. Like them better. They don’t have blow outs. Review 4: rating 5.0. Great price make clean- up a snap Makes cleaning the small coffee containers easy, this is my second order. Much cheaper than walfart Review 5: rating 4.0. Filters are good for the purpose good filters for the price but just one peeve - the purple ring gets in the way of opening the thing. We invariably accidentally lift it separately which causes it to loosen from the top and eventually we end up just tearing it off. Will buy again purple ring or no purple ring :-) Review 6: rating 5.0. Nothing wrong with these If these are the best deal on filters today, get them. They work just fine. Review 7: rating 5.0. Saves money! These things are wonderful! Put it in a reusable filter(plastic) drop in the filter, fill with your favorite coffee and brew. When your coffee is done, simply lift out the filter and compost! The paper filters are saving us so much money while still enjoying the coffee we love. Review 8: rating 3.0. Not the worst and not the best 3 stars because the filters leave a bit of sediment in every cup, I used a different brand before and left no sediment whatsoever in the cup. I hate to leave mediocre reviews, but in this case, I have to admit there are better filters in the market. They do work! this product is not garbage, just the sediment problem. Review 9: rating 1.0. Make sure you actually receive the 600 count box Ordered 600 count product in Aug 2019 and just realized today that we received the 300 count. The boxes look the same with on the count being different. Heads up if you order this. Review 10: rating 1.0. Terrible Product The filters were purchased to use with a Keurig 2.0 reusable cartridges. After using approximately 10 of the filters 9 ripped. Before doing a review of the product I decided to use 100 of the filters to give a fair assessment of the quality. They failed miserably. 92 of the 100 paper filters failed. That is a 92% fail rate. I would not recommend this product and definitely would not purchase from this company again. Review 11: rating 1.0. Don't buy, filter tears letting gounds out bottom no matter what replaceable k-cup is used. We have a new Keurig machine and use replaceable k-cups with the screens in them. Wanted more filtering so bought these filters. Have a few different replaceable k-cups and they all bust through these filters letting the grounds out into the bottom of the k-cup. Probably would work with a replaceable k-cup that had screen that fully supported bottom of filter. Review 12: rating 5.0. Money saving for kcups I have used these before and they are perfect for using in my reusable k-cups. Sure makes clean up easier. I have 15 refillable k cups which I fill with my favorite Starbucks coffees. I have 3 flavors, 5 k cups of each. Depending on how much coffee I drink, they usually last a week. I keep them in a container with a lid for freshness. The paper filters add a tiny bit to the cost but still so much more economical than the alternative. I get my coffee on s... Review 13: rating 5.0. Keep the sludge out of my coffee. These K-cup pod filters work great. I've been using these for a couple of years now and highly recommend for those who use the reusable pods, although I prefer the unbleached version, these were a good value. They were well packed and arrived quickly.
I felt guilty about using the K-cups, adding to our already over-filled landfills. To address some of the complaints I read for this and other similar products like it, just keep a couple of rules ... Review 14: rating 5.0. Fits the original My K-Cup reusable pod I like using the reusable K-cups because I prefer the variety of coffees compared to pre-packed K-cups. And because I like my coffee black, I feel that fresh ground/brewed coffee just tastes better than the pre-packed K-cups. One issue that I've had was that the really fine coffee grounds would end up in my coffee because the mesh filter wasn't fine enough to remove them. The super fine grinds it would leave a bitter taste since it would con... Review 15: rating 3.0. Not the same as before This is my 2nd purchase of these K-cup disposable filters. I believe the manufacturer has made them cheaper (thinner). The bottom of these filters are tearing during brewing and leaving a lot of coffee grounds in the bottom of the reusable K-cup. I am very disappointed because I purchased 600 of these after experiencing no tearing issues with my first order. Review 16: rating 1.0. Product too small The product was too small for our coffeemaker. I was able to return it for a full refund. Very pleased with how fast they processed the refund. Review 17: rating 5.0. Every little bit helps to cut down on plastic waste! I like the Keurig but hated all the plastic waste. The filters and reusable cups make it earth friendly and that is a good thing. Review 18: rating 2.0. Will not purchase again These paper filters are too shallow for my Kcup reusable. They overflow coffee grounds if I put filter in all the way. And the coffee taste is affected because the paper filter inhibits how much coffee to brew. I like a 12 oz cup and these filters hold only enough for 6 oz cup Review 19: rating 5.0. Convenient use. These are fantastic little time savers. We like the K-cups, since they save on the environment, and allow you the freedom of using whatever coffee you ground that morning. Variety is the spice of life, but cleaning the little guys isn't always easy, or fast. Dishwashers just get filtered, so you shouldn't probably use them.

With these little paper liners, you pop it out and no mess, no fuss. You do have to rinse the top of the k-cup lid. The taste is anoth... Review 20: rating 2.0. Overall the filter works. The edges of the filter overhung the edges of the cup more than I liked . It made it difficult to close the cup tightly.
persona: This customer prioritizes functional performance and reliability in coffee filters, favoring products that prevent coffee grounds from leaking and simplify cleanup, while being sensitive to size and durability inconsistencies that impact usability.
reference_output:
rating 1.0. Not like my first order This late order of coffee filters are thinner,smaller.
I Use the filters so I get rid of all the coffee grinds at one time.
Almost every single filter has broken in the bottom and I have coffee filters in the bottom of my coffee pods that is not why I’m using coffee filters.
Wish I had saved one of my old filters to show the difference.

reviews:

Another search leads me to Amazon and this repair kit wh... Review 4: rating 2.0. Didnt last long Bought this at the end of December. Worked for a couple weeks and then stopped. Didn’t receive all parts I only received two of the five parts I was supposed to get. Now my dryer won’t be fixed in time for the holidays because I didn’t even receive 50% of what I paid for. Review 16: rating 1.0. product looked good everything fit ! worked for two loads simple install hopefully will be able to resolve the problem luckily neighbor does tear outs and remodels have back up for now! Review 17: rating 1.0. This product is no good. No heat in dryer, element stopped working already! Review 18: rating 1.0. Part failed, neither Seller or Amazon customer service has helped. Part failed, neither Seller or Amazon customer service has helped. Seller has NOT responded and Amazon allows this type of false advertisement and service. Cancelled my Amazon Prime because it is worthless, Amazon allows this terrible service to continue. Review 19: rating 1.0. Didnt work. Disgusted. Didn't work out of the box. But this product got me very upset and wanted to make sure no one else make the same mistakes that I've made. None of which helped resolved the issues. So I knew that all my stock fuses and heating elements were stil...
persona: This customer prioritizes functional performance and durability in their purchases, willing to pay more for reliable, high-quality components that prevent long-term issues like product failure or debris contamination.
reference_output: rating 1.0. Poor quality It did get my dryer running for a few months.  Then stopped working and here is why. See pics, it also left black dust from the disintegrating heating element.  I know the original parts are much more expensive they are probably worth it.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. Same taste. Fits our kenmore elite - went in easy, haven't noticed a difference in water taste from the stock filter. Review 2: rating 5.0. good product perfect fit, wife hasn't complained about the water. Win/Win, I say. Review 3: rating 1.0. too slow, then fills up and stops working.. price is right but the flow is significant slower than my previous filter.. -Kenmore oem filter that came with this fridge I followed the instructions to a T. this one fits but does not work properly... Review 4: rating 5.0. Five Stars Love it! Love it! Got it fast and inexpensive . Review 5: rating 5.0. Works Great! Just as advertised and way cheaper than the LG filter at Lowe's. I ordered two of them. Review 6: rating 5.0. Great Water Filter Great product! Takes all of the nasty taste out of my water. Review 7: rating 5.0. Fit perfectly and works great in our fridge Fit perfectly and works great in our fridge Review 8: rating 5.0. Five Stars Worked as well as expensive brand!! Review 9: rating 5.0. Just as good as name brand and less expensive. This filter works just as well as the name brand one that is more expensive. Definitely tell the difference when we use filtered water instead of straight from the tap. Review 10: rating 4.0. so replacement was easy to install These have the exact same footprint as the factory filter, so replacement was easy to install.
No smell or taste in the water. Would purchase this product again. Review 11: rating 5.0. REAL 5 Star Review GREAT PRODUCT!
I bought this to replace a filter for my LG refrigerator, well those LG filters are like $60! No way!
So, I researched and THESE are certified for the same level of filtering that the LG are.
SAME!!

The price is amazing.
And yes, this is a REAL review not a fake one where the person got the product for free and said they gave an honest review. Oh bull poop. The review is 5 star and you get free stuff? Yeah, I bought and... Review 12: rating 5.0. Five Stars This is the best price I could find anywhere - great shipping! Review 13: rating 5.0. Great filter Great filter. Ez to change and a perfect fit. Review 14: rating 4.0. Not bad Fits fine but the water doesn't taste quite as good as it did with the LG brand filter. Review 15: rating 5.0. Seems to do the job and water tastes fine. So far so good. I just replaced my filter in my LG refrigerator and this fit perfectly and the water seems to taste great. No complaints and will probably purchase this brand again after I see how water tastes when it is time to change filter. Review 16: rating 5.0. water tastes great! It fit perfectly, water tastes great! Review 17: rating 5.0. Works in my LG refrigerator This filter fit right into my LG refrigerator and has been working well. We have had it for about a month with hard water and haven't had any problems with it getting clogged up. Review 18: rating 4.0. Water tastes good. Price was great What can I say. Recently installed filter with no installation problems. Water tastes good. Price was great. Review 19: rating 5.0. Great price...great product Great price...great product. Can see no difference between LG product and this one! Review 20: rating 5.0. Five Stars very easy to install. will reorder again.
persona: This customer prioritizes affordability, ease of installation, and product compatibility, favoring reliable, self-installable solutions that offer clear cost savings over branded or retail alternatives.
reference_output: rating 5.0. Great Price for Replacement Filters! Great price for replacement filters. The refrigerator manufacturers use filters as a continued source of profit. I can buy this Waterdrop Filter way cheaper and it works just as well. Easy to install and I noticed increased flow immediately. I will continue to buy these filters when I need a replacement.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. The part fit exactly The part fit my dishwasher exactly and fixed a very annoying bug caused by the little steel rod of the handle accidentally bending. Review 2: rating 3.0. No handle included This latch seems to be fine but I ordered it assuming it would come with the handle that is used on the outside to open the door. It does not. That was the part that broke. I can't figure out how to order that handle either. I understand now why the latch doesn't come with the handle. The handles can be white, almond or ??? The latch is only 1 color. Review 3: rating 5.0. Perfect Replacement The door latch on my Jenn-Air failed and the door wouldn't stay latched anymore. Another website I found is excellent at directing you to the correct part for pretty much anything on the dishwasher. They also sell this part, but at a higher price. In fact, it is generally a good idea to shop around the internet for dishwasher parts in general, Costs vary considerably among vendors.

This part was an exact match and a relatively easy do-it-yourself pr... Review 4: rating 1.0. no actual "Latch" The actual Latch (the part that you pull with your hand) to open the dishwasher is not on this part. Review 5: rating 2.0. Latch not included and it does not specify that to you in the ad Do not order as the latch is not included and that is the actual part that breaks! The picture of the item is from the rear so it's hard to see that. I wonder if it's on purpose to receive the "20%" restocking fee from the return.

Other than that the shipping was quick (let's see if the return/refund is equally as good). Review 6: rating 1.0. STOP! ORDER THE ASSEMBLY! Deceptive product presentation. DO NOT ORDER THIS PART. IT DOES NOT COME WITH THE PART THAT BREAKS - THE HANDLE. This is the second time this part has broken on my dishwasher. I managed to order the right part the first time by using this part number. Now, apparently, I have to order an "assembly." Really? My only mistake was not reading the reviews before ordering. It's apparent hey've stuck other customers, too, collected their shipping fees and th... Review 7: rating 2.0. My mistake? I didnt realize this part does not include the handle. Had to return it and reorder one that did include the handle which was the part that failed on my dishwasher Review 8: rating 5.0. Easy fix This is the 2nd time I have replaced this part in a few years. I don't know if it's just a poor design, or the fact that I use my dishwasher every day and wear it out quickly. If you have 10 minutes and can turn a screwdriver, you can easily replace this part yourself. Removing the bottom rack makes it a little easier, and marking the wiring harnesses makes it easy to reconnect them correctly. Review 9: rating 1.0. Quick shipping but does not include the handle. THIS PART DOES NOT INCLUDE THE HANDLE! The handle is what broke, and is not sold alone. Now I have to order the whole thing again from somewhere else so it will include the handle! Review 10: rating 5.0. A DIY dream. An easy part to replace and it worked great. Review 11: rating 2.0. Two Stars I needed the latch with handle. I had to order a different one. Review 12: rating 5.0. Very nice The part fit perfectly in my Jenn Air. About a five minute job but I'm pretty handy. Review 13: rating 5.0. Great quality but do you need the handle too? This is only the latch OEM or OEM quality. I needed the latch and handle. I returned this one and orders the Latch Assembly Review 14: rating 1.0. worked one time bought a new worked one time bought a new dishwasher Review 15: rating 1.0. worked one time bought a new worked one time bought a new dishwasher
persona: This customer prioritizes fast shipping and functional performance, with a strong preference for products that meet their needs immediately; they are likely to repurchase if the item works reliably, but will discontinue use and seek alternatives if it fails after initial use.

Review 1: rating 1.0. Quit working I haven’t had this dryer a year and it has quit working already Review 2: rating 5.0. Quite impressed We needed something to get us by as our dryer broke and new one would not be delivered for a couple weeks. I was sceptical after reading reviews of a bunch of these smaller dryers. Went with this one, even though a little more expensive, just because of how quickly I could get it delivered. I received it in perfect condition. No dents. Hooked it up in 3 minutes (just put it on top of my broken full size Samsung piece of junk broken dryer until they come to replace it)... Review 3: rating 1.0. Sounds just like a regular dryer. I do recommend placing it next to a window because the room does get hot. This is a very good investment for people who have purchased a portable washer, living in a apartment or a small house. Doe... Review 5: rating 1.0. The dial is on the bottom {weird} so you cant really see it unless you constantly bend down. NOTHING works but the on/off button so i have to keep checking the clothes. UNFORTUNATELY it sat in the box past 30 days until i got rid of the bigger one and I cant send it back. I will TRY and get a refund and Update if needed. Now it just sits in a closet barely used because i c... Review 7: rating 3.0. Works but takes very long time Works quietly but takes 3x time to finish drying than laundromat.This dryer doesn’t have option to turn on the heating immediately if you stop the dryer during half of the drying and start the drying again after 3/4 hours . Review 8: rating 1.0. Dead on arrival I purchased this dryer for the brand, but it was dead on arrival, returned the product. Review 9: rating 5.0. A God Send For My Family We live in an apartment that isn't really washer/dryer friendly but as a family of 4, it was tiring always lugging our laundry down 2 flights the stairs and 3 blocks away to to to the public laundromat (live in NYC) and having to lug it all back. It was also costly as we were spending at least $40 each time to wash and dry. Purchased this during the height of the pandemic to supplement a previously purchased portable washer. Before buying this dryer, it would... Review 10: rating 5.0. Beast for 120 volts! Amazing dryer for those who need 120 volt standard outlet, or to save space. This unit replaced our old one. And it is night and day the the last one. Powerful, great heat, ample options and holds a lot more than I imagined. It dries so we'll, it's hard to believe it's 120 volt unit. Highly recommend.
One sidenote. When I 1st plugged it it, it came on, got hot, but did not spin. I simply took the screws to the back off and saw the belt that goes around the... Review 11: rating 1.0. Aesthetically Unappealing.. We went through the process of 3 separate units and ALL 3 were dented. The pics are of all 3 units. They are dented. An update on it actual operation with aesthetic damages will come soon after. Review 12: rating 4.0. A lifesaver in a small space We've only had ours for a couple days, but it works very well! It fits a good amount of clothes. Our portable washer fits 1.1 cu ft, and I was able to dry 2 washer loads at the same time with room to spare. We also have a spin dryer, so we can cut the dry time to about that of a normal dryer by running the clothes through there first. You'll need a vent kit, which you can get pretty cheaply. We have ours venting out a window. I would not recommend venting... Review 13: rating 5.0. GREAT BUY !WORTH IT! [[VIDEOID:395b69eeb80b3aac97384c7e9d78bd4f]] This is a great dryer , I live in an apartment that does not have a dryer in my home .. however this works and gets the job done in a timely fashion . Literally the same time you would at a laundromat or in home set up. No I don’t have a filter ! reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. Great for brewing your own Keurig coffee! These are a really great way to save money and brew your own store bought coffee in the Keurig. My girlfriend really wanted the purple color somInsaid why not :). They actually look nice on display in the Kcup holder. Very happy with this purchase and they make some good coffee. Review 2: rating 1.0. Do not buy! Fill these things halfway up with coffee grounds, you still get grounds in your cup. What utter and complete trash... Review 3: rating 4.0. Worth the $ I've been using another reusable cup that required a paper filter. Now I not only save $ on paper filters, but I believe I now get the full flavor of the coffee with the Delibru K-cups. They are easy to fill and use. The reason for 4 stars is because I still get some leaking of water from around the K-cups when I brew. I make sure to fill only to the top of the wire mesh, but still get a little leakage. Review 4: rating 1.0. Spills coffee. Do not purchase these for the B70 model. Coffee leaked out of the top for all 4 filters. Review 5: rating 5.0. I highly recommend the DéliBrü, this is my sencond order and I love them. These are just right, they fit my Keurig 1.0 perfectly. They are recessed on the bottom to accommodate the needle on the Keurig 1.0.
In the past I ordered k-cups that said backwards compatible and they are but you have to insert the pod in a very specific orientation or you puncture the bottom screen which will leave coffee grounds in your cup. Usually I'm not that wide awake on that first cup and punctu... Review 6: rating 5.0. YES Yeah! It works. I stuff my fav tea bag inside and wait for it...wait for it. I've got tea! Now watch me save money. Cha Ching! Review 7: rating 2.0. Not Impressed!!! Not too impressed by these. Im going to have to see if I'm doing something wrong, but I've tried twice to use these cups (2 different ones), and as coffee starts dispensing, water shoots out of a couple areas around where the K-Cup sits. Also, you can easily see that there is brown coffee being dispensed, bit this is obviously clear water. Another problem is that this water runs down the outside of the machine and straight into my cup mixing with the coffee being ... Review 8: rating 1.0. Did arrive on time and in good condition. Water doesn't flow thru the "screens" of the cup fast enough so the water runs out the top of the cup...and all over the place. Wish I can find the ones I had before my move!

Did arrive on time and in good condition. Review 9: rating 5.0. Delibru made my mornings bearable again I purchased these to replace another brand with dolphins that I had purchased to replace a different, now unavailable, brand of reusable cup. Using the dolphin brand with some grinds of coffee caused the machine to build up pressure and stop working so that it took three tries to make one cup of coffee. As I'm sure you can imagine, I wasn't a very happy camper. I finally determined that the reason was because the dolphin brand doesn't have a... Review 10: rating 5.0. GREAT PRODUCT These reusable k-cups are easy to use & to clean. Most importantly, I'm extremely satisfied with the taste of my coffee!.. and the $avings! Review 11: rating 5.0. Good product and saves you money! Makes good cup of tea! These cups work really well. I primarily bought them to brew loose tea in my keurig K55. After a few times of brewing I realized that in order to get a nice strong cup of tea one needs to grind the tea to be very find in a food processor before filling cups. I ground up a bunch and put it in a jar.
These cups will save you a lot of money as so much cheaper than buying the K-cups although I still use K-cups. If you use tea ... Review 12: rating 5.0. Excellent value Excellent money saver for Keurig owners. You can use these cups to brew coffee that may not be available in k-cups. I have used other types of refillable cups and they do not come up to the standards of these. They are easy to use and require no modification of your Keurig machine. The filter surface allows the liquid to flow freely and quickly without a mess. Even thinly (almost powdery) ground coffee does not pass through the filter. The cups are dishwasher safe... Review 13: rating 2.0. Most re-usable K-cups have a rubber ring around the lid ... Most re-usable K-cups have a rubber ring around the lid that holds the lid down so that the water does not push the lid open while its being pushed through the coffee grounds. The rubber ring on 3 of the 4 cups I received was way too undersized and allowed the lid to stay slightly open in some areas allowing water to leak out of my Keurig while trying to make coffee. Review 14: rating 5.0. Great product These are great. Easy to use and clean. Great for coffee or tea. Never any residue in cup from either. I'd highly recommend. Review 15: rating 2.0. HIGH HOPES >>> LOW RESULTS...BUT THERE IS A BETTER CHOICE ON AMAZON The Delibru reusable cups for Keurig brewers have a "shower head" design and lots of screen area, including the bottom. In fact, there's so much screen, and so little plastic frame, that it feels flimsy. The bottom screen is recessed to prevent it from being punctured by the Keurig's bottom piercing needle (good) but that method of protecting it also reduces the volume for coffee, thereby limiting brew stre... Review 16: rating 1.0. the lids open and coffee grounds get all over the ... the lids open and coffee grounds get all over the inside of my coffee maker Review 17: rating 5.0. Five Stars They work great. Fit coffee maker well. Clean easily in dishwasher. Review 18: rating 5.0. Great deal and quality item Great deal and quality item. Works great in my new Keurig K425 and I love that they're BPA free and dishwasher safe. Almost identical to the one Keurig My KCup I purchased at the store and 1/4 the price since you get 4. Highly recommend. Review 19: rating 2.0. Poor design These are not designed properly. The water runs through them too quickly and you don't get a descent cup of coffee. Also, the water often times over flows from the top and makes a mess. I have a different one that has dolphins designed into the side and it works well. I'll be returning these and trying to re-order the last ones I had. Review 20: rating 1.0. Not impressed and disappointed. The water overflows and leaks out of the Keurig making a big mess and weak coffee. Not impressed and disappointed.

Also, upon starting the machine, with a load of laundry, there was not enough water to wash the clothes. This is the secon... Review 4: rating 1.0. Maytag, Whirlpool and Kenmore are awful companies. I inherited this washer and certainly won't get the same kind next round. Review 7: rating 1.0. One Star Stop working after one week. Review 8: rating 1.0. Fixes various problems with top load auto fill washers If you're reading this, you have a top load washer that uses this sensor/switch. Symptoms of problems where this switch is the culprit include:
1 - Washer starts agitating and filling the moment you turn it on (should fill first, then agitate)
2 - Washer does not start when you pull the timer switch
You might be able to get the washer working by blowing compressed air into the sensor port (where the plastic tube a... Review 11: rating 1.0. Save time & money... buy a new washing machine What a piece of junk. If this part goes bad on your washing machine, just replace the stupid washer. It's an easy repair (YouTube is your friend), but the part is prone to failure and there is NO WARRANTY. Search online for yourself and you'll find details of the pending class action law suit against Whirlpool for the incessant problems people have had with the machine that uses this part. persona: This customer values consistent product performance and reliability, particularly in water filtration effectiveness and durability, and is highly sensitive to price changes, demonstrating loyalty to a product they perceive as unmatched in value despite rising costs.
reference_output: rating 5.0. Raise your drain pipe.  Maybe Well, like everyone else I've been have repeated problems with this part for a while. I did the blowing in the hose and tapping and it worked for a while. Now nothing worked so I bought a new one. Read an article that said repeated failures could be caused by the drain pipe being too low. It should be 42 inches from the ground. If it's lower it could cause sifoning of water back into the sensor which causes the contacts in the sensor to fail. Hopefully this helps. New sensor works perfectly so far.

persona: This customer prioritizes product compatibility and functional integrity, is frustrated by poor-quality add-ons, and expects bundled items to seamlessly integrate with their primary purchase.
reference_output: rating 1.0. Junk - Find one That Fits, if You Can The coffeemaker is junk, the reusable coffee filter is junk, and now add this to the pile - junk. Sellers highlight add on items to bundle with your product; and you expect it to be compatible with the product that you bought. This filter does not even come close to be compatible with the coffeemaker. The filter holder can “fit” into the filter socket in the coffeemaker, but the “legs” are twice as long as they shoud be. Since the filter holder does not seat the the filter socket it floats in the tank when it is filled with water.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 4.0. Not quite perfect but... I like the design but the eggs are a little difficult to place into the container and remove.  The huge plus is that it has a cover so you can stack other light weight items on top of the container without damaging the eggs.  Overall, I'd probably buy it again.

Review 2: rating 4.0. perfect for my eggs perfect for my eggs.  This makes it easy to see the amount of eggs we have.  I like that better to pull them out without the worry of the carton collapsing when there are just a few eggs in the container.

Review 3: rating 2.0. Almost There was a problem with the molding so the bottom of one of the egg compartments is discolored. It doesn't really bother me, but my wife definitely doesn't like it. It could have been isolated to only ours. No way to know.

Review 4: rating 4.0. Like that you can see thru and eggs are quite ... Like that you can see thru and eggs are quite safe but maybe overly. Top too easily slides if you’ve stacked two and very awkward getting the eggs out since design is so close together. And if you have nails well ladies you know what I mean. Have lost three eggs so far.

Review 5: rating 5.0. Love Love love this I love this egg holder.  I have a counter depth Haier fridge and this fits perfectly.  I never use the lid on it.  I love that it's a little deeper than the eggs, so I usually have a few extra (6-7) eggs nestled on top.  I never have exactly 12 eggs, there's usually a few extra in there when I buy another dozen so I love that they fit securely nestled on top (just don't stack other food on top of the eggs and the eggs are secure)

Review 6: rating 5.0. Sturdy Egg Holder. I purchased this egg holder as a replacement of a prior mDesign version that I had purchased from Amazon last year.  The 2017 version was made from two different types of plastics.  The lower portion was white and it shrunk in the dishwasher whereas the lid was clear plastic which did not shrink so the lid no longer fit on the bottom after it's tour through the dishwasher.  This replacement is all clear plastic so should be dishwasher washable - they must have gott...

Review 7: rating 3.0. The space between the top of this product and where ... The space between the top of this product and where the egg sits is too large/deep and it is often very difficult to gently lay the last egg in and to get eggs out.  Even with an abundance of care, I end up cracking at least one egg in a dozen with this container.

Review 1: rating 4.0. Bought new July 2019. Owned 5-6+ DDWs since 2001. Good to replace older models. Quiet. Cleans well. This model is much better than the DDW497 I replaced. The DDW621 is *far* quieter and cleans items in the dishwasher noticeably better.

There is one negative point. The left side has a pair of adjustable/removable shelves. Excellent Moved into a new place with a small sink and no dishwasher, had an agreement with the wife that if she did the laundry, i'd hand wash all the dishes. I bought this the next day and she called me a cheater. It's very easy to use, setup is simple, it's quiet, very efficient, and holds a bit more than I expected. I do wish it were a little taller so my full sized plates would fit in it, however, the plates are bigger than normal. Review 9: rating 4.0. Holds a surprising amount of dishes! It is SUPER quiet! I can stand right next to it and have a phone conversation.

Review 19: rating 5.0. I freakin love this thing! It had been over 2 years since I had a dishwasher, and so I am just thrilled to find something that I can have in my small space, and it cleans well. It takes up my whole counter, but I already did food prep at the table, and the counter was cluttered. The capacity is like the equivalent of half of a regular dishwasher, but I don't mind doing more loads for the ease of not having to handwash anymore! I don't do a lot of rinsing or wiping beforehand and they... Review 20: rating 1.0. One Star Arrived broken. Had to return.
persona: This customer prioritizes compact, high-performance portable appliances that deliver reliable, quiet operation and ample capacity, seeking durable solutions that fit space-limited living situations without compromising on functionality or ease of use.
reference_output: rating 5.0. This thing is a work horse! I live in a rental and cannot install a permanent dishwasher, there is limited room for a full size portable one. I researched for weeks and settled on this one. Wow! Am I impressed. It's super easy to use and runs very quiet.  The only noise you really here is when the pump goes off. The pumps kind of loud but only for a couple of minutes till its done emptying. I cook and bake alot and this dish washer can handle what ever i throw at it. It can fit more then you think with some creative loading.  The only time i've had a problem with unclean dishes us when I've over loaded it. I use liquid dishwasher detergent and have no issues. One thing i do recommend is not to use to much detergent as it will leave spots ,less is more.  The filter in the bottom is removable and very easy to clean. This dishwasher fits perfectly under my cabinet.  I wanted it further away from the sink at the end if my counter so hubby went to the hardware store bought four clamps, the right size hoses and extended the lines, works beautifully. Bought a giant command hook and attached it to the side of the dishwasher,  just roll up the hose and store there when not in use. All in all I'm very pleased with my purchase and would definitely buy again.

Received it in about a day and a half. It does not look exactly like what we had, but the parts married up well, and after another half hour or so on the floor it was time to give it a shot. The pump sounded like it was having a hard time -not strong squish, squish sound. I took it apart after watching some youtubes and the impeller was loose, like about to fall off. Drained the washer, removed three screws and the old one came off. This new one matched up, attached the screws and we're done. It took about 20 minutes and probably saved hundreds. persona: This customer prioritizes brewing performance and filter quality, favoring products that enhance coffee flavor and flow consistency, and is willing to switch brands based on superior functionality and design, though they value durability and structural integrity in filter papers.
reference_output:
rating 5.0. A better Stainless Steel filter. This is the second stainless steel filter I have used. I use paper filters with both of these steel filters. I feel the coffee's flavor is better when this product is used than my first filter. This filter is easier to clean and use than my first one with the plastic diffuser on the top. I believe this filter produces better results due to the lack of drains on the sides of the body. This forces the brewing water to flow through a single path top to bottom through the depth of the coffee grounds and not through side drains of my previous model. I believe this is closer to the way water flows through a one shot K-Cup cartridge and therefore produces a better robust flavor. The only issue I have encountered is an occasional drip from lid fill hole or rim. This may be due to my use of a paper filter with this product and is also present in my first steel filter.

(Update)
I've been using this product for a while now and I am still getting good results consistently with it. It appears to be more tolerant of my high filling of the "Simple Cups" paper filters I use with this. I did not even notice the one time a paper filter "blew out" because the grounds were well contained within the bottom of the stainless steel filter. I am still convinced that my "Fill N'Save Elite Series Stainless Steel" filter is an improvement to my previous stainless steel filter. All though these improvements are minor, I still prefer using this product to my previous Stainless Steel filter.

reviews:

This filter is gold screened, sides and bottom, with a hand bail to keep your fingers clean of ground coffee when you remove it from the coffee maker. We user ours with a Cuisinart Grind ... Review 13: rating 5.0. Good quality, saves money I always wanted a gold basket and purchased it together with a Cuisinart Grind-n-Brew. It is of high quality materials and labor, and works great. I don't use it now because I don't like the sediment left in the bottom of the pot and cup. I knew it did this because I read it in the reviews. As a personal preference, I continue to use paper filters and keep my gold filter in a zip loc bag for a backup. Review 14: rating 2.0. Two Stars Very cheap product. Handle is weakest link. Ed Review 16: rating 2.0. Inexpensive but cheap Great price, you get what you pay for. The basket is “fine” but a little thin. The handle broke in the first week. I suspect that's why other reviewers comment that it doesn't quite fit right. No problems getting a quick refund from the seller, though. Review 18: rating 5.0. normal for a gold filter The previous reviewer is correct about the "sediment" from the filter. Typically gold filters allow the oils and other properties of the ground bean to pass though, instead of being stuck in the paper filter. This gives a darker richer coffee. It also means you have a small "shot" of more dense coffee at the end of your cup. You can either drink it or not, some people really like the taste of the gold filter, others are used to the paper and don't like it... Review 19: rating 2.0. rating 4.0. Thinner and lighter OEM replacement Updated OEM replacement of our Cuisinart coffee maker basket. The first one I received had a manufacturer defect, but I contacted the seller, sent pictures,many they sent another immediately. Great customer service!
Although this basket is lighter and has thinner walls than the original, this IS the OEM replacement for our Cuisnart coffee maker. I feel like it is more fragile than the original, but we are just trying to be more careful with our handling of it. The handle is thinner, as well, and tends to slip down easier than the original, but it doesn't effect its performance. Would purchase again.

persona: This customer values functional, space-efficient appliances that are easy to install, operate, and integrate into a compact living environment, prioritizing practicality, performance, and convenience over aesthetics or brand loyalty.
reference_output:
rating 5.0. I Like This Freezer So Much...That I Bought 2 of Them! I buy beef from a farmer who raises cattle for slaughter. I needed more freezer space so that I could store the meat in such a way as to easily see what I had, rather than having to dig through a deep freezer.

I do have a small deep freeze in the basement, but I purchased one of these freezers -- and later a second one -- and now I have plenty of room for all of my frozen goods. The shelves make it really easy to keep things organized.

The temp control is excellent (it's on the outside back of the unit). The freezers are super quiet -- in fact sometimes I have to listen hard -- just to be sure they're still running (which they always have been).

These units are also easy to defrost, and the outside wipes clean with a slightly damp cloth. I am 100% satisfied with these freezers.

rating 5.0. we found it extremely easy to set up and use While we have only had the ice maker for one week, we found it extremely easy to set up and use. The ice can be made in three sizes of which we choose the medium size. Ice is made quickly and if not used, melts down and water is used to make fresh ice. I would buy this product again.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 1.0. Broke Broke within a few weeks

Review 2: rating 5.0. Love this coffee filter! I bought this filter and though, "Wow! People seem pretty excited about this coffee filter. What can possibly be that great about it?" It really is that great. It funnels all of the drip coffee efficiently so it doesn't get stuck to the sides of the glass when I'm using my Chemex and take forever. It's also super easy to clean and stays looking like new - no weird stains or hard to scrub spots. We truly use this every day and it's one of the better purchases ...

Review 3: rating 3.0. It’s great...until it isn’t. It’s great...until it isn’t. I’ve tried 2 or 3 variations of this type of filter and they’ve all worked great, until they clog up. Daily cleaning, soak it in vinegar, use the cleaning brush...doesn’t matter. Takes about a month before it clogs up but, at some point, it’s going to clog up and your coffee experience in the morning will have to wait...and wait...and wait.

Review 4: rating 2.0. Slow decline For the first month or two, it was brilliant! I was so happy to not waste the paper filters. Then it slowly stopped working as well. After a minute or two the flow slows down so it takes a loooooooong time to make coffee. Now, the rubber gasket thing has fallen off and WILL NOT go back on.

Review 5: rating 1.0. Fell apart in less than 3 months of daily use Ordered one July 23rd. It arrived timely and appeared to be good quality. Skeptical about this because of reports about clogging. Pleasantly surprised this was not an issue with routine cleaning. The brew was good for less than three months, then it came apart. The cone detached from the rim and our Chemex is full of grounds! So sad, we wanted this to work. Could not find warranty information through Amazon or seller’s store. Hence this n...

Review 6: rating 3.0. The cons outweigh the pros Will save you money on paper filters but.  Removing the grinds after every  use is messy and the grit you get in the bottom of your cup that a paper filter would have filtered doesn't justify the convenience or money you will save.

Review 7: rating 1.0. It’s impossible to clean thoroughly. I’ve had this for about a year now. My coffee has been tasting worse and worse, couldn’t understand why. Today I realized that you CANNOT completely clean this filter. Coffee gets stuck in between the two layers of filter and it’s impossible to clean without dismantling it. I’m afraid I’ve been drinking rotten moldy year old coffee caked up inside this thing. Unfortunately paper filters are safer than this.

Review 8: rating 1.0. Coffee Lovers, Find something Else Water drips so slowly the coffee is cold by the time a cup is made

Review 9: rating 1.0. Extremely slow I used the same amount of coffee and water as I have with other metal mesh filters and this thing is SLOW. Took about 20 minutes to get one cup of coffee, with other filters it would take about 5 minutes.

Review 10: rating 1.0. One Month Clogged up At first, this product seemed to work as good as a competitor filter that I have used for a year.  That lasted for a about a month and then it clogged up.  Then, I used vinegar and water for cleaning as it suggested and it didn't seem to make a difference.  My wife used straight vinegar.  Still clogged.

Review 11: rating 5.0. Makes perfect pour over! I’ve been using this just about daily for six months and I love it!! It’s so much easier than using paper filters and more economical. No more issues with occasional filters breaking mid pour. This thing is sturdy and fits my Chemex perfectly. It comes with a soft bottle brush to clean it. Would definitely recommend this item.

Review 12: rating 2.0. Infuriatingly slow with espresso ground beans. ONLY use coarse grind. Immediately clogs with fine and even regular grind beans. Only works with a very coarse grind.

Review 13: rating 2.0. Disappointing Watery Coffee The water passes through this filter waaay too fast even with a meticulous slow dripping pour. I added a paper filter which helped but completely defeats the purpose. I really miss my previous filter which broke apart after years of use. This filter is a waste of money.

Review 14: rating 5.0. Exactly as described This filter arrived quickly and is just what I needed to enjoy freshly brewed coffee.

Review 15: rating 5.0. Minimalist function and beauty Simply the most museum worthy coffee filter any Java enthusiast would love. It's gorgeous, works great and cleans fast. Chemex never had it so good.

Review 16: rating 5.0. Had it for Years -- Still Awesome I bought this during the C19 shortage of paper Chemex filters, so it's been 2 years now and it still works great, tastes great, and saved me who-knows-how-much money on paper filters. Very happy :)

Review 17: rating 5.0. Great taste with less mess! The edge of the filiter fits over the top edge of the Chemex coffee pot. Helps to keep the loose coffee grains from getting into the coffee. Easy to clean!

Review 18: rating 5.0. It's definitely Paperless I've used it for a couple of days, and have to say it's living up to the happy reviews. I'm using it with the Bodum 1 Liter pour-over coffee maker, into which fits perfectly, and am taking my time. The result is definitely what I had hoped for. Being a double-layer filter, not even fine-ground coffee grains slip through, making additional paper filters unnecessary. I couldn't be more pleased.

reference_output: rating 2.0. Plugged up too much to use after 1 month This is the second one of these I've purchased, the first one made it about a year before it got too clogged up to use anymore, this newest one only made it a month. Tried everything to keep it clean and deep clean it; poured boiling water through after every use, boiled in water several times, boiled in vinegar, nothing worked. Takes about 30 minutes for coffee to filter through when it should take 2 and the coffee tastes much worse for it. Great idea/concept, just wish they worked well enough to warrant it.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. Perfect ice maker This is my first time using an ice maker. I bought because I like drinks with ice. This ice maker is really convenient and you just need to add water into the machine and press the button. Then, you can just wait for the ice to come out. I have been using it for a week. Perfect experience!
Delivery is also fast, about four days. Review 2: rating 5.0. Great buy Not a noticeable noise, the first time making ice did take a while but after that it was like an assembly line. Review 3: rating 5.0. Love this ice maker! I never really knew I needed an ice maker until I had this one! It is super easy to use. You just fill your water to the fill line, and it will make the best little icecubes and super fast too! They are super good tasting too. When you use those ice cubes, it starts making more! It has a nice little basket that your ice cubes go into and a scoop to get them out! It is fairly quiet. You can hear it making the ice, but it's not overly loud. It is slick looking and ... Review 4: rating 3.0. Not as sturdy as I was hoping. I have had 3 different ice machines in the last 5-6 years. This one had the highest price tag but the lowest quality. There is only one size for the cube, and sometimes even when it has water it doesn't make cubes and other times its fine.
This is just what I have found in owning it for about a month. Its not worth the time/energy to return it, I will use it until it runs its course in the ice maker universe. Review 5: rating 5.0. Super fast. [[VIDEOID:aeb93d62c9fdf34d9825360f77311c16]] Needing more ice on the boat as spring rapidly approaches. This ice maker is fast and quiet. I've attached some images of the device. The short video is a time-lapse of the 8 minute ice formation. I was curious but didn't want to watch it for 8-minutes. LOL
Tasty ice that fits in the neck of a 20oz pop bottle or fill a glass to chill your favorite drink. Fill to the line and turn it on. Instructions were clear on its opera... Review 6: rating 5.0. Great ice maker This ice maker does the trick! Simply put the water in and in minutes you have ice. It keeps running until the basket is full. If the ice melts it will start up on its own and make the ice again.

We use this for camping to have ice but also find it beneficial to use in our house when we aren’t camping! Review 7: rating 5.0. Efficient ice maker [[VIDEOID:75f3b9bbe9987a8579426d1b15414789]] Buy this preparing for this summer. The ice maker is very efficient. Make 4 ice bowels in about 4 mins. It is a lot of fun to look at how the ice bowels coming off from the freezing rods. Tastless ices. No plastic smell. Highly recommended! Review 8: rating 5.0. Super convenient, compact ice maker I use this a lot for fishing trips. Instead of emptying the ice maker in the freezer into my cooler and leaving everyone with no ice, I just plug this in the night before.
The rounded ice cubes are nice. They don’t puncture bait bags or sandwich bags sharing the cooler with them. Review 9: rating 5.0. Quick and simple ice maker I got this when it came up on prime deals. Did not spend much time researching. Got one for portability so I do not have to get up and go to the refrigerator when I enjoy my stints with John Barleycorn. It is fairly quick, and the ice is tasteless (no smell of plastic etc.). There is a consistent humming noise that probably is a fan running. My only gripe with this thing is that there is no way to change the size of ice it makes. The default size of ice is ... Review 10: rating 5.0. Very nice to have on a hot day Love this thing it is great when u live some where that has a fridge but no ice maker it will definitely come in handy in summer Review 11: rating 1.0. Absolute piece of crap, don't waste your money!!!!!!!! I have been relying on portable ice makers for over five years now. I have bought a different brand every time over the last 5 purchases, hoping to find a good one. A friend warned me about the short life span of these devices. From my experience I have found that these little gems only last a year at best. This one lasted right at 10 days. It is actually easier to fill ice trays instead of relying on this piece of garbage! YOU ... Review 12: rating 1.0. Broken Packaging looked like it was damaged, took it out of box only to find it has a big crack on the inside. Will be returning it ! Review 13: rating 4.0. When I put ice in freezer it froze in one big clump Had to return it because I store the ice cubes it makes in my freezer. When I'm ready to use the ice it's in one big clump because it was still to wet. I've tried to wait it out and put it in the freezer but nothing has worked so I had to return it 😞 Other than that problem it was great. It took about 3 hours for the machine to use all the water while making the ice cubes. So we had plenty of ice in the freezer but unfortunately it ... Review 14: rating 5.0. I like it I like ice, I really can't drink anything without ice and our icemaker in our fridge is broke so we were buying a lot of ice every week, this seemed a perfect solution and for a reasonable price, and it works great, the ice is always a little thin on the first batch but after that they are pretty solid, and its makes ice pretty fast, it really doesn't take long before you have a basket full, I guess the only downside would be the ice melts pretty fast, which is kind of anno... Review 15: rating 3.0. ZAFRO Countertop Ice Maker Overall a 3-star unit. Some re-engineering and redesign are needed. Longevity is still TBD.
Pros - Compact, lightweight, attractive., relatively quiet While it is convenient, the reservoir and bucket are small and only suitable for 1 or 2 people. Not for large gatherings. Fast cycle time.
Cons - (Engineering) Shovel angle not high enough to dump ice deep into bucker, causing an infrared ice detector alert too frequently and often unnecessaril... Review 16: rating 1.0. Broken after one use First day was fine, second day and so forth keeps asking me to add water even though there is a full tank of water. Review 17: rating 5.0. ice really fast The ice maker in our refrigerator broke down these days, and I got used to drinking ice water. I was very anxious without ice. Then I saw this kind of machine on the Internet, but I didn't expect it to be very small. But after the plug, pour water, ice out of the speed is very fast, really did not expect, I fell in love with. A very practical ice machine! Review 18: rating 1.0. Broke Quickly I don't usually write many reviews, I do have to for this one. This item worked great for a couple of weeks and then stopped powering on. It would have been great if it lasted. Review 19: rating 5.0. The ice is refreshing 😋 I didn't have an ice maker on my fridge so this exceeded my expectations. I don't have to wait long for it to fill up with ice. Only took a few minutes for set up and my kids enjoy the ease of using it. Review 20: rating 3.0. Doesn’t make a lot It runs well and is easy to use but in general the ice slides into the tray in such a way that it stacks on itself and then triggers the sensor to shut off because it is “full” but really only a few cubes are there. To get a full tray you have to continually move the cubes around. We had a different brand before this and the tray would fill better so I wouldn’t buy this unit again.
persona: This customer prioritizes affordability and perceived value, often making purchases based on significant price savings, but is highly sensitive to hidden costs like excessive energy consumption and product compatibility issues that undermine long-term usability.
reference_output: rating 1.0. I really liked the unit.... Until I realized using it 4 days,10 hours each, raised my light bill $60 in a month. I cant afford to keep using it 😞 Update August 5. It's using more like $100 in electricity for 2 gallon bags of ice which would cost me $7. Please let me return it. It raised my light bill more than I realized. Absurd. I want to return/refund.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 2.0. Don't really work They don't really work that well, no matter how many times I tried. I tried them in a Keurig K55. Easy to use and fits perfect in my Keruig, not grounds in my coffee and I was able to pick up without burning my hands. This will be a great cost savings for me as the cost is only as much as 1 pk of K cups I should be able to recupe the cost within the first week of use. Review 3: rating 2.0. not even sure if they can be returned now but I don't think I will waste the time and money returning them especially when there ... The description says they could be put in and washed in the dishwasher and now the cover of one just melted...not even sure if they can be returned now but I don't think I will waste the time and money returning them es... Review 4: rating 5.0. Great reusable cups! I had a k cup habit, and now thanks to these I can stop buying disposable pods and put in coffee that I like for cheap! These worked great for the Keurig K140 machine we have in the office, and these are super easy to clean! Review 5: rating 5.0. fantastic needed item with the K machine these are fantastic. Also, one of the cups mesh has already torn with less than a week of use. Not sure these will hold up for too long.

Updating this feedback. I've used these daily and they are great. The coffee tastes perfect and they are holding up to daily use. Also, the customer service is fantastic. I had one cup ... Review 7: rating 5.0. Perfect fit and easy insert After much research, I decided on these K cups. So far they have worked great and fit my compact Keurig just fine. I purchased three sets to have plenty prefilled K cups for my elderly MIL. She can now have her cup of coffee when she wants and has no problem inserting them as they are not directional. Review 8: rating 1.0. does NOT work with Keurig Mini Plus Although some reviews claim otherwise, these do NOT work in my new Keurig Mini Plus (the 2018 model that's 5" wide). The top "pin" in a Mini Plus does not pivot, so comes down at an angle. It hits the top disk of the cup. We used a pliers to remove the top disk, to try to make it work. However, the bottom of the cup is also too wide to fit down into the machine - the machine will not close with one of these cups in. Disappointed. Review 9: rating 5.0. I love my kuerig but hated using so many k cups Exactly what I was looking for, I love my kuerig but hated using so many k cups. I ordered these about a month ago and they work great. Review 10: rating 2.0. Not sturdy This thing is not very good. Came in warped. I asked for replacement and it was not honored! Not very good Review 11: rating 5.0. Five Stars Great deal and they fit our Keurig 145 OfficePro! Review 12: rating 2.0. Does not stay closed. These worked well when I first bought them. They produced good coffee with no leakage. However, after constant washings, the lids do not stay on. I have four of these and the lids do not stay on any of them when you push it down. I'm disappointed with the quality. Review 13: rating 5.0. Great way to save money and not add extra plastic to the landfill The price was great and work perfectly. The mesh is fine enough that there were no grains in my coffee. Easy to use!! Will be buying another set soon. Review 14: rating 1.0. DOES NOT WORK Does not work with my K475 2.0!! I just get the message "Oops- this pod does not work with this brewer." The pod fits, but the brewer refuses to recognize it. (And I do use other off brand k cups and have no problem. I don't know why it won't accept these reusable cups.
Very disappointed because they look great otherwise.
Customer service is very responsive but does not fix the fact that these won't work. Review 15: rating 4.0. "Great product, terrible follow-up" This product makes my life so so much easier! Using ground coffee instead of kcups is much cheaper and not really that much more work, and better for the environment. I used to use the keurig brand reusable filters but the Delibru ones are easier.
With the Delibru filters the cartridge holder in the keurig (the part with the bottom needle) does not need to be taken out, which is a quality that makes a world of a difference for lazy people li... Review 16: rating 1.0. Does not fit K150. False advertising I purchased a set of these from another vendor before I knew the model number of the kuerig we use at work. Those didn't work, so I looked up the model number and came searching. With all the good reviews and it SPECIFICALLY saying it fit the K150 model, I figured these had to work. No. The cup does not fit property into the K150 model. In fact, they are EXACTLY the same cup I got from the other supplier. It has to be forced into the machin... Review 17: rating 1.0. Even with thorough rinsing with water and running through dishwasher each of these reusable filters after only 6-10 uses has been running water all over my countertop, making a mess, unless hold your cup right under the brewing area. Would not buy again. Review 18: rating 5.0. Easy to use and brews a delicious cup Easy to use and brews a delicious cup of your own choice of coffee. We like a half-caffeine cup and do not like the only half-caff option widely available. With these cups we can brew to our taste. Easy to clean-up as well. Review 19: rating 1.0. This product does not work on Keurig coffee makers. ... This product does not work on Keurig coffee makers. I have two Keurig's, one old and one new. The coffee and water squirts out the sides of the unit. Review 20: rating 5.0. If you like to save money and love coffee I despise buying Kcups when i can use my Peets or SB coffee. This is a game changer: Save money, Use what you already have and eco friendly. The material is not flimsy and mesh is great so no filter is needed unless your the type that enjoys that extra step but its unnecessary here lol. Im happy and my wallet is too :)
persona: This customer values functionality, ease of use, and product reliability, with a preference for sturdy, BPA-free materials; they are willing to overlook minor inefficiencies if the product performs well overall, but are highly sensitive to compatibility issues and product misalignment with expectations.
reference_output: rating 1.0. A complete waste of money I have a Keurig mini plus, takes the same size as the Keurig series 2, of which I have a few at home  and wanted a few more. reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. Great filters! Have purchased multiple times. These are great water filters. Have purchased before and will again in the future. Items are just as described. One thing not really described well is about soaking filter before use. It doesn’t say to do it in instructions but says it somewhere in troubleshooting to soak it for 15 minutes prior to installation. So this is what I did. Water runs fast and clean. Review 2: rating 5.0. great product at a great price I liked the product and service just fine, only issue was I ordered the wrong filter for my fridge. they were very good to work with on making the return and prompt refunding my entire amount. I will be back again. Review 3: rating 5.0. a rare breed - certified i was disappointed to see that we could not replace our whirlpool brand water filter for our kitchen aide frig-freezer. i spent a lot of time researching. i bought a purelli which touts made in u.s.a. but inspecting last year but the box and filter there are virtually no claims about what it does or is made of. I saw a comment on another filter that we need to look for NSF certification 42 for chlorine and nominal particulates and 53 for lead, mercury, asb... Review 4: rating 3.0. Made in China filters Filters looked great on paper with all the certifications but would not allow water flow to my refrigerator, also product made in China Review 5: rating 5.0. Great so far! Had for about a week and I've notice no difference in the taste of my water from the more expensive filter. I'll have to wait and see if over time this changes but for now works the same at a much, much, much better price! Review 6: rating 1.0. Does not fit!! Unable to adapt filter to refrigerator, does not match description Review 7: rating 3.0. High TDS reading just after installation. TDS test after installation showed 123 PPM classified as ordinary quality water. Review 8: rating 5.0. Fit perfectly Purchased the 3 filter pack and installed first filter about 2 weeks ago. Filter fit perfectly and installed easily and without any problems. I did presoak the filter for about 20 minutes before installing which may have helped get full water flow right away. So far. taste and odor are very good. Review 9: rating 1.0. Not Exact 14396508 Replacement! Filter does not fit older filter units that are set up for (only) 4396508 filters. The spigot that enters the filter housing is 1/8" too long (4396510 variant?) The extra tip length does not allow filter tip register correctly within housing and internal locking slot. In other words this aftermarket filter Did Not Work in my older Kitchen Aid fridge. Other than not working for my application the filter appears well made. Returned product to Amazon. Review 10: rating 5.0. Worked out nicely! The water actually tastes better than it ever has. I would buy these again! Review 11: rating 5.0. Great Filter Value and Customer Service i purchased this filter for my Whirlpool Side by Side Refrigerator. At first I thought the filter end was different and it didn't seem to fit. Working with the great customer service, I found that with just a little more effort the filter fit and was fine. It's a good value. The staff are very patient. Review 12: rating 5.0. Good Product! Good Product! Works as expected. Review 13: rating 5.0. Perfect replacement and value Great value fit exactly as an original prompt shipping. When these are used I will order them again. Review 14: rating 5.0. Fits & works exactly as described I believe this takes out the chlorine and other chems added to our city water.
Fits my whirlpool fridge as listed. Review 15: rating 5.0. Far more effective than what the refrigerator manufacturers sell This is an amazing water filter. For years I have been using filters that manufacturers such as Whirlpool sold or specified. AND, my water always had a funny taste. I installed one of these filters and the difference was absolutely amazing. I think it has something to do with the filtration effectiveness. The standard filter manufacturers never give a micron size of their filter effectiveness. These filters are ra... Review 16: rating 5.0. Same filter as the expensive name brand ones you buy at Lowes, but at a much lower price. Installed it a few days ago in our fridge. Seems just like the name brand ones we buy at Lowes, but at such a better price. So far we are very happy with this filter and will definitely buy it again. Review 17: rating 1.0. Water tastes awful Basically the water filters produce awful tasting water. Do not recommend. Review 18: rating 1.0. Not worth it in my opinnion The water smells and tastes like plastic. Review 19: rating 5.0. Water filter Filters the water greatly, great product and also great value. I will buy again as a matter of fact this is the second time I’m buying his cartage.
