reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. Great deal! If you aren't sure about which one ... I ordered this to add an additional gallon shelf in the middle of the right side door on my LG French Door Refrigerator (model LMXS27626S). It is identical to the existing middle shelf, and now I have lots of room for pickles, jelly, applesauce, and Prego. Great deal! If you aren't sure about which one to order, you can ask LG online cutomer service chat for the part number. Be careful; they are not all the same size! Review 2: rating 1.0. One Star Door shelf was broken when I received it. Sent item back for full refund thanks Bob Review 3: rating 5.0. a little disappointment in as much as it says OEM but it ... after spending 2000. dollars on an LG refrigerator, 3 of 5 plastic bins have broken. I'm Livid at LG products and will never buy any again. This purchase to replace the bin worked out. a little disappointment in as much as it says OEM but it has distinctly different features writing, colors etc.but it fits perfectly and I'm hoping it is made of better plastic. Review 4: rating 5.0. Fits my fridge; should be gold trimmed Fit the bill perfectly-as always though, why are accessories to appliances WAY overpriced? First door bin broke off and since the sides could not be repaired, the bin could not stay in the door at all far less hold items. I NEEDED a shelf for my milk, so I bit the bullet and made the purchase. However, I am trying to get by with duct tape on a second bin that cracked along the bottom so that the front and side faces fell off. Owned the fridge fo... Review 5: rating 5.0. Fit perfect Easy to install. Now if I can just stop grabbing it to close the fridge door maybe this one won't crack! Review 6: rating 5.0. Perfect replacement part I have a Kenmore Elite French door fridge that listed the same part number for the door bin. It fits perfectly. Review 7: rating 5.0. Works Perfectly! We have a LG LFX28977ST that had a cracked tray. I tried gluing it several times but it kept getting worse. I bought this and it fits perfectly and holds my gallon milk jugs with no problem.

My only negative comment is my original had a genuine simulated aluminum plastic edge and this one is clear across the top. It's hard to tell from the picture. Guess they changed them on the newer models. If you're OCD, then you might want to keep looking or order... Review 8: rating 5.0. Identical to original Looks identical to the original that broke. Very surprised that the original one broke with a large mayo, ketchup and mustard. I guess I haVE heavyweight condiments! Review 9: rating 4.0. Fits a new LG as well as the model listed This shelf also fits a new LG Model LMXS27626S. Bought one, then ordered a second. The only problem I have with both LG and Samsung refrigerators is the shelves crack on the bottom of the shelf and also along the edges where they attach to the door. This item was identical to the original shelf it replaced. I am purchasing a second one to add space in the 'fridge. Review 10: rating 5.0. Perfect fit for our LG LFX28968 We put about a half dozen pickle jars in it so we know just where the pickles are. Review 11: rating 1.0. Broken upon delivery Shelf was broken in the box Review 12: rating 4.0. Works well I was looking for an extra bin for my LG LMXS27626S refrigerator, and this one was an exact OEM match. Only gripe is that it seems spendy for a piece of plastic, but it's worked out well to have the extra storage and I'm glad I decided to purchase it. Review 13: rating 5.0. Good replacement part Fit perfectly to replace the shelf that broke in my LG refrigerator. I'm not happy that the original broke in only a year or that a mass-produced piece of plastic costs this much, but it is what is and I'm pleased this was at least an easy fix. Review 14: rating 3.0. The part i needed, arrived with a peice broken. This is the shelf that fits my lg fridge. I paid close to 30 (28 dollars) for it, it was bubble wrapped in a big box without any additional stuffing. When i unwrapped it, it was broken. The corner clip (white part) was broken and clacking around. I did not go thru the hassle of sending back, and feel that for a new item and at that cost, it should arrive NOT broken. Hence the 3 stars. Review 15: rating 5.0. Fits perfectly and is stronger than the original. Fits perfectly and stronger than the original. Review 16: rating 5.0. Good replacement Not 100% same as the original racks but works as well. This rack was clear in the front where mine was solid white but it fits well. Review 17: rating 5.0. So far so good This is a replacement piece. Seems to be made better and more sturdy than original piece. Review 18: rating 5.0. Does the job These things are expensive, but it was an apt replacement. Review 19: rating 5.0. Perfect Replacement for the LG Door Bin that had Broke Received this the next day after ordering. The Amazon page confirmed that this Door Bin fit my model number LG refrigerator (and one of the reviewers also had the same model number and said it fit). I had attempted to glue the one that cracked because of a too tall jar hitting the top of the door opening - lesson learned about confirming items in the bin will easily clear. The cracks in the bin botttom didn't "glue-up" all that ... Review 20: rating 5.0. Good replacement I easily found and replaced this shelf but there was no replacement for the narrower one at the lower level. The original has a weakness when the owner closes the door repeatedly by pulling on the shelf which is easier to grab. The original shelf can't take the strain because there is a seam at the stress point. That's poor design. I know that I should use the handle but it is an unconscious method of closing the door. I hope this one holds up better and I am mo...
persona: This customer prioritizes functional durability and capacity in storage products, values similarity to original designs, and seeks reliable, space-efficient solutions that offer clear utility for everyday household use.
reference_output: rating 5.0. Shelf is large; can hold gallon of milk Product is very similar to original product.  Can hold 2 gallons of milk or 1 gallon of milk and other items.  Product is sturdy, seems well made. Very happy with purchase.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. As promised! After going to a "big box" store to purchase a replacement filter and seeing the pricing (sticker shock) I decided to look online and found this filter for more than 1/2 the price of the "big box" store! I decided to take a chance on an unknown, and am I glad I did! The product arrived as promised and was a perfect fit! I will definetly be purchasing all my future fridge replacement filters from here! Review 2: rating 2.0. Don't bother with this junk Bought it based on all the positive reviews and price. Boy, was I wrong...

Water taste funny, does not filter well at all, waterline started to make knocking noises. Sending it back to Amazon for OEM. A costly lesson since return fee is half of the cost. Review 3: rating 1.0. Slow leak It installed well, thought it was the perfect fit, looked for leaks (see other people's reviews) did not see any. My leak was a small one that did not drip out the front, but instead dripped slowly into the fridge and down into the freezer, I did not notice for about 4 days until I found a large puddle at the bottom of my fridge. Looks like I'll have to order the more expensive Samsung model. Which luckily is cheaper on Amazon. Review 4: rating 1.0. Water leaked all over my kitchen After installing this product, water began leaking down the inside of the refrigerator. I didn't realize it until about 20 minutes later, when I had a huge puddle in my kitchen. I took it out, examined the o-ring and everything looked okay. I re-installed the filter two more times and it was still leaking. Cheap quality product; I returned immediately and bought the Samsung brand replacement filter. Review 5: rating 4.0. Does the job more economically than the OEM When I went to replace the filter in my Samsung fridge for the first time, I was a bit shocked at the price of the OEM filter. I found this replacement on Amazon at about 30% less than the Samsung brand and decided to give it a try. Installation was a snap and it fit my fridge (Model# RS265TDRS) as well as the original. Unfortunately, the first one leaked a bit. Since I bought it from Amazon, this wasn't much of a problem. I just put a towe... Review 6: rating 5.0. Fits well, filters well, way cheaper than OEM Love our new Samsung refrigerator (1 year, 4 mo, 2 door, bottom freezer, 2 icemaker) It started making a funny motor-like vibrating noise about 6 months ago. I felt it was water hammer because we have a large house and great water pressure. Put a water hammer reducer in place and changed the filter out. Noticeable increase in the water stream out of the dispenser. Noise stopped! Did not like paying $40 for the OEM filter though!. 2 month... Review 7: rating 5.0. Was a good replacement for the factory Samsung filter A little tighter seal but no leaks good flow and water tastes fine. Couldn't be happier especially for the price versus the factory filter. Review 8: rating 5.0. A Reasonably-Priced Alternative to the OEM Samsung Water Filter Like many owners of a new refrigerator with a water-and-ice dispenser, I was shocked at the price for a replacement water filter. At $50 a pop, I seriously considered installing an in-line water filter and just foregoing a replacement water filter altogether. However, I decided to do some investigating and was pleased to learn that aftermarket water filters were available from several Amazon sellers.

The Supco... Review 9: rating 1.0. Less than a month old I ordered this filter less than a month ago, and am now ordering an OEM Samsung replacement. It worked great, for the first two weeks, but now it tastes like I'm drinking unfiltered tap water. Blech! Review 10: rating 5.0. Eco Aqua works great This EcoAqua water filter works great in my Samsung french door fridge. I purchased it because it was $15.00 less than the manufactures brand. Come to find out it works exactly the same as the more expensive brand. Our water tastes great and the filter seems to be doing its job. Review 11: rating 5.0. Slightly louder, but not too much so Picked up one of these when we needed to replace the filter in our Samsung refrigerator. The water now comes out at a slightly higher pressure and the filter is a little bit louder, but not so much that it bothers us, just enough that we noticed at first.

I had read other reviews that said there was some minor leaking caused with this filter, but we didn't have these issues, at least yet. Review 12: rating 5.0. Good replacement This water filter works as good as the brand name one and much less expensive. I will be ordering more. Review 13: rating 1.0. Leakage I guess I'm one of the unlucky ones around here, but mine leaked as well. Could have caused a lot of damage if I didn't catch it while it was happening. Worked great for a week or two, then found the entire bottom of the fridge filled with water and it was leaking out the front of the fridge. Cleaned it up, not knowing what the problem was, and the puddle at the bottom of the fridge returned.

Going back to official Samsung filters... I loved that this was cheaper b... Review 14: rating 5.0. Works great with my Samsung RFG297HDRS Picked this up to go into my Samsung RFG297HDRS, and it works great. Granted, this was my first replacement I've made in my unit, so you can't forget to run this for about 5 minutes to clear everything out. I did have an issue the first 6-7 times I used it after installation of air bleeding into the line, so I took the unit out and re-seated it and I believe that was purely user error.

I'm happy with the price, and my wife is happy ... Review 15: rating 5.0. Great replacement filter I purchased only one filter so I could test it out for myself. I am happy with my purchase. The filter was packaged well. It fits my refrigerator perfectly, and the water takes great. The price is reasonable, especially compared to the Samsung brand filters. I recommend these filters, and I plan to purchase more. Review 16: rating 1.0. Stopped working after 1 month After 1 month (almost exactly) water will not pass through it. Replaced with OEM filter works fine, put this one back in stops, rinse/repeat, it's the filter. 1 month is not worth the savings. Review 17: rating 5.0. Highly Recommend ! Colder and Faster water than the name brand filter replacement Much cheaper than the name brand filter and works so much better. My water is now cold when it come from the fridge, that was not the case with the Samsung filter replacements. The flow is much faster, too, and half the cost!!!
Highly recommend and super fast shipping!! Review 18: rating 1.0. Water will not flow in my fridge with this filter Maybe I just got a bad unit...but I got a bad unit.
I have taken this filter out and re-installed it over a dozen times in my fridge thinking maybe it is not sitting just right.
It is in and it seems tight and fitting correctly.
Sometimes I can get water to flow from my dispenser for a short time after putting the filter in...then the water stops flowing.
I have taken it out and confirmed the fridge water dispenser... Review 19: rating 2.0. Seems to work fine. But my filter does not reset with this Seems to work fine. But my filter does not reset with this. Tried holding the button for 3 seconds.... 5 seconds.... 10 seconds.......... No go. Tried pulling it out, turning it 180 degrees thinking it was maybe how it was sitting, but that didn't help either. I can live with a light but all I'm saying is that if the light doesn't go off it makes you question the whole filter. Review 20: rating 1.0. Terrible product! Second time I buy it and second ... Terrible product! Second time I buy it and second time it doesn't work! It simply doesn't let the water through! I tried to insert it several times, water runs a little bit, for couple of seconds, and then again stops. I will return it.
persona: This customer prioritizes product functionality and reliability above all else, and is willing to return items or seek OEM alternatives if performance fails to meet basic expectations.
reference_output: rating 1.0. One Star The water trickles out of this thing. I had to return and get a OEM version.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. Works Perfect! this fits perfect and looks perfect! i almost spent $50 on the part from the manufacturer!! 6 was much better! can't even tell the difference! very pleased. Review 2: rating 5.0. Inexpensive alternative Replacement parts for refrigerators are so expensive! I thought I'd give this a try since it was 1/4 the price of the other brands. It fit great and it looks exactly like the original piece that was in my fridge. I've only had it for about 6 weeks so I cannot attest to it's longevity at this point but I'm hopeful. Review 3: rating 4.0. Easy to return if it does not fit Did not fit but it was super easy to return and get my money back. so if it does fit your fridge you got a deal because if you buy them from the refrigeration dealership they're $50 a piece Review 4: rating 5.0. easy installation Replacement part works perfectly. Would have replace sooner. Amazon is the best. Appliancepartspros.com is the perfect resource to get the correct parts and there are installation videos for diy. Appears to be sturdy. Too soon to rate. Review 5: rating 5.0. Perfect Match! Look at the bottom of a shelf for the right #! My original bottom two shelves broke years ago. I never bothered to replace them because they just aren’t that sturdy to begin with. Was pouring over options for replacements on here, trying to match to model # or product number... until I finally looked at the bottom of one of the shelves in my freezer and found the MAGIC NUMBER! No more confusion!

Shelves came swiftly and fit and look just like the origina... Review 6: rating 1.0. Did not fit It didn’t fit my refrigerator. So sad grandson broke mine. Review 7: rating 1.0. Make sure you order the right size Make sure you order the right size Review 8: rating 1.0. Doesnt fit as described Didnt fit, no bottom to shelf Review 9: rating 1.0. Too big The listing said it would fit my model but it was way too big Review 10: rating 5.0. It fit I liked ut and it fit perfectly Review 11: rating 1.0. not sturdy tabs were not sturdy and cracked Review 12: rating 1.0. Too big It was too big, couldnt use it Review 13: rating 1.0. Too big, didn't fit my fridge. Unfortunately I was not able to use it. It was slightly wider than my fridge. It didn't fit. 😕 Review 14: rating 1.0. Not quality product It’s broken right away i didn’t event use it for a month Review 15: rating 3.0. Easy to replace part that meets the need. Not the heavy duty plastic used in the original parts. Does fit nicely and gets the job done. Cant say this will last long, only time will tell, but if you want to replace your broken part, this will meet the need. Review 16: rating 1.0. Cheap Very thin plastic one end was deformed and it keeps piping out of the slots on the frig. Review 17: rating 4.0. Great quality for the price Great product, definitely saves money. It’s more flexible than the ones that came with the fridge (which were broken anyways) so definitely worth the price for what you get! Review 18: rating 5.0. Awesome value, great price Just what i needed at a fraction of the cost. Durable and inexpensive. Have had it in place for months now with no issue. Review 19: rating 2.0. Fits and technically does the job, but quality is less than original This item fits my freezer door, but the plastic is thinner than the original. I am wondering if it will last very long before it cracks. If I had known, I would rather have paid a bit more to get a better quality product than this. Review 20: rating 5.0. Perfect fit! Door shelf in freezer broke and needed replacement
persona: This customer prioritizes functional fit and affordability, accepting lower build quality if the product performs reliably and matches the original design at a fraction of the cost.
reference_output:
rating 5.0. It's good, but It's sad that this is even needed This product is fine and exactly like the original Frigidaire piece. It's too much like the original it's flimsy to the point of being laughable. Well, the Frigidaire branded one cost 10 times as much so it's laughable but not at all funny. With 2 or 3 grams of plastic it could have been 100 times stronger than the poorly designed original.

What horrifying is that the original is so flimsy. I want my 1950 fridge back. Ran for over 1/2 a century, built to with survive a nuclear war. The modern fridge can't survive a bag of frozen peas.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 2.0. Make sure it is closed tightly! I decided to get these stainless steel reusable K Cups for my Keurig to save money by buying the pre-made ones. I was disappointed to find out that unless you have the lid in place perfectly, you will end up with coffee grounds in your coffee. There should really be a locking mechanism on it because unless you close it in the perfect position it leaks. I hope you have better luck with these than I have had! Review 2: rating 1.0. Doesn't fit keurigs Tried it in 2 different keurigs and it doesn't fit. There was so much resistance to get it into my machine I was worried I would break my machines. I would have returned them, but I've misplaced one of them so I can't return it. Total waste of money. Review 3: rating 5.0. Great! Works great and healthy! There is fine dust that gets through and sells at bottom, but still happy with it! Review 4: rating 2.0. Not functional Fits too tight in the Keurig. Coffee does not come out easily when finished brewing. Review 5: rating 2.0. Not sure what's wrong with mine.. I got these about three weeks ago and have been using them almost daily. I figured if they were metal they would be fairly durable and waste friendly, which they are. However, there are small red plastic pieces atop the k-cup that have started to warp and fall off due to the heat from brewing. I don't know if my machine is getting hotter than others, however these k-cups are not usable once the small plastic pieces pop off, as the coffee grounds end ... Review 6: rating 5.0. Works well for me! I was a little hesitant to purchase after looking at some of the reviews, but decided to try anyways to get away from the total plastic reusable pods I have been using. I have the keurig 1.0 and it works perfectly! The hinge needs to be at the top when you load it in the machine. I didn't have any leaks or grind spillage. I will now purchase more, knowing that it works for my needs. Review 7: rating 1.0. They don’t work in my instapot coffee machine Bought these to save money on K-cups. They don’t work in my machine but standard kcups do. Review 8: rating 2.0. It leaves coffee grounds in your cup🙁 I really wanted this to work. I tried it with and without a paper filter.
Without the filter, it left a lot coffee grounds in my cup.
With the filter, the top would not close tightly. I altered the filter so that it wouldn’t touch the top, but I was once again left with coffee grounds in my cup. Unfortunately it just didn’t work well for me. Review 9: rating 1.0. Does Not Fit Properly These cups do not fit properly making it difficult to close the lid. They are too big for the compartment. Review 10: rating 1.0. Doesn’t fit well I have a keurig mini plus hard to close the top. Not comfortable with the fit. Review 11: rating 1.0. Does not work in CHULUX K-Cup machines I really wanted a reusable filter for my new CHULUX K-cup coffee maker.
I like stainless more than the other plastic products.
This product is well-built, heavy steel. Nice 15 mL metal scoop in the 2-pack.
HOWEVER, it does NOT fit in the CHULUX K-Cup coffee maker.

reference_output:
rating 5.0. First time cold-brewing coffee, and I love this! I have mason jars out the kazoo that I use for everything. I read reviews on Amazon for the different cold-brew filters available for mason jars, and this one got the best reviews so I ordered it. I've done two batches of coffee concentrate so far, using 12 oz. of Kirkland Signature ground Columbian coffee, then fill the jar to the top, and it's turned out very well. If I am careful not to stir too vigorously, even this fairly fine drip grind works well with little sediment, which falls to the bottom of the jar. So I have not had to use a coffee filter to filter the concentrate, although I might filter the dregs at the bottom into the next batch. I've found the filter easy to rinse out before starting a new batch. Haven't put it through the dishwasher yet....

We were using a kettle and pour-over using Oxo's little pour-over coffee set, and we've been going through filters pretty quickly. I far prefer dumping coffee grounds directly into the garden without the filters having to decompose also. It's actually quicker to make our coffee in the morning using the concentrate method. We just pour about a quarter of our mug full of the concentrate (SigO likes it stronger) and swirl-pour hot water to fill the mug. The coffee is plenty hot, but those who love to burn their tongues won't be pleased. The coffee turns out smooth and rich with no bitterness, and my stomach definitely thanks me for this.

reference_output:
rating 5.0. Used for years, but not compatible with some newer models (K-Mini, specifically) Was recently gifted a K-mini brewer and, to my disappointment, these refillable k-cups are *not* compatible with Keurig's K-mini brewer (purchased Oct 2018). The needle/load system is different than traditional Keurig brewers.

Otherwise; I've used this with an older Keurig brewer for many years with no troubles. Easy to fill, easy to wash, easy to use. Very recommended -- as long as you confirm compatibility. Hopefully the makers of these will make a version compatible with the K-mini soon.

reference_output:
rating 2.0. They changed the filters, not good! These are great! Easy to use with the Eco-Fill 2.0 Deluxe single serve coffee filter for Keurig 2.0 Series. Just pop in the filter, put in your favorite coffee, brew, and toss, it's that simple! I will be back to buy more when I get close to the end.

Update: 1/30/16 - I just received another order of 300. This time instead of being in a loosely packed bag and in a box, they were all placed tightly in a small box packaged in a larger box. The first problem I noticed was they were made of thicker paper, secondly, they were larger in size. I now have to carefully force them into my Eco-Fill 2 filter basket and make sure they retain their shape when doing so. Thirdly and most importantly, after the brewing cycle is complete I noticed it takes longer for my Keurig to push air through the filter to drain it, this is because the paper is more dense and does not allow for proper drainage when the air is pumped through it. I thought it would be okay at first, but now I'm concerned I could damage my machine as it is working harder to get the air through the filter. I'm going to see about returning these and see if I can get the smaller, less dense size.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. Exactly what I was hoping for. These filters have worked out great. No more grounds getting through to my coffee mug.

Review 2: rating 5.0. Very helpful filter I don't know about other people but I am super pleased with these filters.  I no longer have a lot of residue in my coffee cup.  In fact the residue has all but disappeared.  I will be buying these again as needed.  A great product.

Review 3: rating 5.0. WONDERFUL PRODUCT!! These filters make clean up so easy!  You simply pull the top of the filter and it pops out into the trash can.  And because you used a filter, clean up of the Refill K-Cup is simple - quickly wash off the grounds from top of the Refill K-Cup and it's ready to use again!  Gave a group of these to a relative to use in her Refill K-Cups as they are terrific!  Definitely recommend this product to anyone who owns a Keurig Coffee machine!

Review 4: rating 3.0. coffee filters these filters do the job, the only thing I would change would being a top cover so coffee does not get on the top of the K-cup,

Review 5: rating 5.0. YOU SAVE MONEY You save money and I got 13 K-cups to make it worth while instead of doing 5 refills at a time. The paper filters are fine.  If you don't mind spending the money then get the loaded K-cups.  I am not the bright bulb on the tree and I will waste thousands of dollars on some crap but it bothers me to spend an extra 30 or 40 cents on loaded K-cups.

Review 6: rating 5.0. Recommended I purchased these because I am a heavy coffee drinker concerned about oils in coffee that might be associated with cancer and/or raised blood sugar (I am diabetic).  While I have to assume these are doing their job and filtering out the oils, I can definitely say these filters smooth and mellow the coffee taste - I love the end result!  No problem separating individual filters from the stack, NP with tearing, easy to use, simplifies clean up.  Frankly, for me, this is all...

Review 7: rating 2.0. this product still leaves a mess on the lid of ... this product still leaves a mess on the lid of the re-useable K-cups;  my preference is the paper filter with fold-over lid...i.e. EZ-Cup filters;

Review 8: rating 3.0. I thought they were going to be as good as the ones I have been buying from Simple ... Poorly packaged, sloppy molding that fits the machine unevenly. I thought they were going to be as good as the ones I have been buying from Simple Cups and they are not.

Review 9: rating 2.0. Two Stars Not too crazy about these things. Water flows over the top as well as coffee grounds.

Review 10: rating 1.0. Too thin paper Filters are made from too thin paper, creating a hole during brewing, letting grounded coffee pass through

Review 11: rating 5.0. Definitely buy. These paper filters fit the pods for my Keurig perfectly.  They work better than all the others I've tried.

Review 12: rating 5.0. A must have when using refillable k-cups The paper filters are the best way to eliminate the residue when using refillable k-ups keeping your coffee smooth and less bitter.  They are now a must have for me!

Review 13: rating 4.0. Good product, repeat customer These are great for keeping a cleaner, sludgeless, cup of coffee. Only downside is they are not consistent in filter thickness and form/shape. Sometimes they are perfect; tight and orderly. Other times they are very loosely formed and take a little extra effort to fit the pod as they should. Still a good product that I recommend for single serve home ground coffee in my Keurig.

Review 14: rating 4.0. Works Great I originally thought these filters were too thin and I tore the first one when slipping into my k-cup. However, after the 1st, with a little more care, they work fine.  What I like about the filters is they are molded well to fit the k-cup with no crimping which I despise about many of the filters sold.  I am pleased and would recommend.

Review 15: rating 2.0. The paper is so thin it is hard to get ... The paper is so thin it is hard to get the paper cups out of the filter holder after it is used...

Review 16: rating 2.0. Two Stars They leaked water over sides and flooded coffee maker.

Review 17: rating 4.0. Almost perfect I wish they were a tad deeper for my ekobrew filter, but they get the job done. I get a *little* less coffee grounds in each use from the not quite exact depth; I have to push the filter deeper to where the paper filter catch goes below the k cup edge.

Review 18: rating 1.0. The additional filtering offered by the paper makes for a better tasting cup of coffee The small paper filters keep the grounds from getting into your coffee.  The additional filtering offered by the paper makes for a better tasting cup of coffee.

Review 19: rating 2.0. Weak coffee filters - not stable.  NET This filter was very weak.  Not strong enough and when we made the first cup of coffee, it was a complete disaster.  Coffee grounds all over the pot and cup.  Needs to be remade into a stronger product.

Review 20: rating 5.0. These are still the very best! This is an update to a previous review I posted.  I use the Ekobrew stainless steel reusable K-cup filters and have probably tried every brand of the paper filters that Amazon sells.  These are by far the very best.  Just the right thickness and fit perfectly.  I have been using them for many years.  The canFly company always includes little personal touches with each order.  Great service and a great product.
persona: This customer values functional performance and cost-effectiveness, preferring products that deliver reliable results at a lower price than brand alternatives, while also being sensitive to product integrity upon arrival.
reference_output: rating 5.0. Good product. These work great in my fill your own Kcups. Prevents the sludge that used to escape from them. Make them easier to clean.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 4.0. Frigidaire 154754502 Upper Spray Arm Assembly for Dish Washer This spray arm gave me a little trouble screwing it on. The old one came off and on very easily, several times. The new one felt like it was cross threaded. I was very careful and even inspected the threads and did not see any damaged threads. I finally had to apply extra extra upward pressure while trying to start the threads but that caused the fitting to move up and become flush with the top of the dishwasher. I had to ... Review 2: rating 5.0. Improvement over the original part I ordered this part to replace the original my dishwasher. We had inadvertently place an item in the top rack that was too tall, and the spray arm hit it finally snapped out of place. We were able to snap the spray arm back into place, but after a few more runs, the spray arm came off again. Soon, we were having to reattach the spray arm after every load.

Upon receiving this replacement, I discovered that it had been redesigned, an it ... Review 3: rating 4.0. Great Replacement This was a replacement for my Frigidaire dishwasher upper spray arm which would always fall off. This replacement piece features a 1-piece design which helps to alleviate this problem that the old 2-piece design had. One issue I had with this new part was that the screw piece wouldn't turn or screw onto the dishwasher no matter how much I tried. I got around this by snapping the new spray arm onto the old screw piece which worked just fine. If it wasn't for that, I ... Review 4: rating 3.0. Great after husband fixed it As mentioned by another reviewer, on the replacement part, the screw piece wouldn't screw onto the dishwasher. The diameter of the threaded piece is actually smaller on the new part!

My husband snapped the new spray arm onto the old screw piece, using the new, 3-prong fastener that came with the new part.

After it was fixed, we took part #s off the old part and searched again to see if we just ordered the wrong thing. Nope - the old ... Review 5: rating 4.0. Better clip, but use your old screw piece This part came quickly and has a much better clip to hold the spray arm on. However, the screw piece would not go onto the top of my dishwasher. Thanks to a few other reviews, I popped the arm and clip off of the top piece and onto the old top piece. Then I could simply screw onto the dishwasher, and voila, problem solved! Review 6: rating 3.0. New Screw piece too small for Existing Thread New Screw piece too small for Existing Thread.
Would not go on.

This is the right replacement piece per Sears Direct part replacement website.
I had to improvise.
I disassembled the arm by gently squeezing the 3-prong fastener in the center of the part.
Then I snapped the new spray arm onto the old screw piece, using the new, 3-prong fastener that came with the new part.
I made sure all the catch spots ... Review 7: rating 3.0. May or may not fit right out of the wrapper. From reviewing the comments it appears there may be two production lines or something else squirrely going on. The part either fits or it is too small; as was the one I rec'd. I swapped out the upper screw portion as discussed in other comments and am hoping for the best. Also. the old part had some water discharge ports but in the new part these ports are located differently and are plugged. Review 8: rating 1.0. Hope it lasts. Review 10: rating 1.0. One Star Did not receive the product described, only the arm. Review 11: rating 1.0. Super I was under the impression I was getting new. I got the most used part you'd ever seen. There was blue stained dish soap in it and white corrosion and the part was broken. Super pissed Review 12: rating 4.0. Better design, but.. They changed the design, but it was odd I couldn't get it to screw into the washer. I had to use the old "nut" which appears to be the same as the new one.
The good news it isn't falling off during operation. Review 13: rating 3.0. This is not a direct fix for the part # ... This is not a direct fix for the part # I needed even though it said it was.... Placing unit side by side it looks the same.
The problem is the threaded part is very slightly smaller so you can't screw it in....Luckily I was able to disassemble the the arm and re-attached it to the old part so it now works Review 14: rating 1.0. The product is better designed then the last replacement part I purchased The product is better designed then the last replacement part I purchased, but as others stated the part that screws onto the hose is not correct. Very frustrated that the company can continue to sell the part when clearly it is not right. Review 15: rating 5.0. You DO NOT need to buy the gasket! Great build quality on this part. First off - I don't know why everyone is buying the gasket shown in "Frequently Bought Together." My original dishwasher did not have a gasket between this and the spout on the top that it screws onto, and I've never had water under my dishwasher. I also have done 5 or 6 loads with this spray arm now, and can say the same. No washer, and no leaks. I took the panel off the bottom of my dishwasher to check. Do... Review 16: rating 3.0. This has a different thread from my Frigidaire dishwasher, ... This has a different thread from my Frigidaire dishwasher, although it was supposed to be a direct replacement. I had to remove the spray arm from the threaded piece, and reuse my old threaded piece. The piece can be removed (if you're careful), and snapped on the old threaded part. The clip looks more secure than my came with, when purchased in 2006. I have now used it @ a dozen times, with no problems. Review 17: rating 1.0. Does not fit Amazon claims this piece fits by the exact model number, but it does not. Absolutely will not screw on. Be very cautious if you are purchasing it for GLD2445RFB0 because it will NOT screw on Review 18: rating 5.0. it screwed easily into place and has been working like a charm ... I ordered this part after the original upper spray arm in our dishwasher started falling off midwash. It turns out that part of the original piece had disintegrated, so it would not stay attached to the top of the dishwasher any more. A short google search led me to this product, and when it arrived, it screwed easily into place and has been working like a charm ever since! Review 19: rating 1.0. One Star Defective, seller would return my calls or emails regarding coming up with a solution. Review 20: rating 1.0. Didn't fit Piece did not properly fit a frigidaire galaxy dishwasher as advertised. Return policy is onerous, buyer beware.

The threads and fittings are slightly different, by disassembling and re-assembling it with parts from the old piece I can at least attach the spray arm but as one might expect it leaks at the fitting rather than all the water going into the spray.
persona: This customer prioritizes health and hygiene in their purchases, seeking products that prevent bacterial growth and mold, and is willing to follow strict maintenance routines; they value reliability, preventative care, and evidence-based performance, and are likely to replace components on a fixed schedule rather than waiting for failure.
reference_output: rating 5.0. Less than 2 year old dishwasher So my Frigidaire FFBD2406NB9B dishwasher that my prior home owner installed prior to them selling us the home is a piece of junk.  This part disintegrated in less than 2 years of use.  Does such a poor job of washing you wonder what Frigidaire was thinking.  Wish I had a choice to upgrade it myself prior.  This is the second time it's broken in less than 2 years.

Review 1: rating 5.0. gets rid of silt I got these for one reason and one reason only: to deal with the nasty silt that accumulated using my reusable, non-keurig brand, k-cup pod. persona: This customer prioritizes functional compatibility and reliable performance in reusable K-Cup filters, particularly valuing a secure seal and consistent fit with their Keurig 2.0 K475, and is willing to test multiple brands to find the best design, even if it means accepting minor flaws like coffee grounds seeping through fine mesh.
reference_output: rating 3.0. Tried Many Brands of Single Cup Paper Filters - All Essentially the Same I don't find much difference among all the single size K-Cup paper filters I've tried so far.  They all tend to wrinkle up when inserted into the plastic refillable K-Cup filters - most especially those with "press-in" type lids - so it's hard to maintain a good seal.  A notable exception, in my experience, is the Nature's Kitchen plastic refillable K-Cup because it has a "snap-on" lid which uses a closure on the outside.

Procedure:
* Turn off power and shut off water.
* Remove kick plate. It just snaps in on both ends.
* Remove screws from the clips on each side of the connection on the water line.
Using the car scissor jack was a great idea! First I moved the food in the door to the shelves in the fridge just in case I would have to for some reason take off the door. But all worked no problem.

persona: This customer prioritizes product authenticity and exact compatibility, especially for replacement parts, and values functionality in niche applications; they are detail-oriented, rely on factual accuracy over general reviews, and are willing to invest in reliable, precise solutions despite potential availability challenges.
reference_output: rating 2.0. Meh Overrated to be sure.  Researched long and hard for a fast simple one cup coffee maker, and was hopeful, but just turns out to not be practical.  For starters, it has increments of 1-4, however anything less than 4 will not provide enough grounds to hold the water in the press -- the water will just drop straight through.  I'm using new Costco (Kirkland) Starbucks whole bean coffee with a burr grinder set to the finest setting, so if the solution is I need to buy a $100 grinder or special coffee beans, then my $20 coffee maker just became $100 coffee maker.  At 4, it does alright (enough grounds to hold the water while I press), but even following instructions to a T and using a thermometer for the water, the coffee comes out more watered down than I can brew in a drip maker.  The wow factor just wasn't there, despite adjusting the water to coffee ratio.  At the end of the day, this is for someone who is completely OCD and wants to futz with their coffee routine until it's perfect.  For me, the good ol' drip maker is running circles around this guy.  One the plus side, If you want one that's been used for a week...

reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. Good quality! Bought for my LG wm2688hnm. All parts fit, Worked excellent! My washing machine came back to life and save me a lot of money. All the parts you need for a bearing replacement in one kit. Review 2: rating 5.0. Not an easy project but worth the time versus money saved. Bearing and seals. Nothing exciting about them... they work fine. Only time will tell their longevity. Recommend only for mechanically inclined people. You will have to literally disassemble washer to its core and then put it back together. Pulling and installing bearing requires some patience and strength. If you want to save money and like fixing stuff then I recommend. Washer operates like new even though 10 years old no... Review 3: rating 5.0. Fit perfect I have a LG WM2688HNM washer and everything fit and worked great! Review 4: rating 1.0. Garbage aftermarket bearings //stay away Welp this is my second time doing bearings on my 11 year old washer. The last bearings worked great but lasted about a year and a half. These bearings started squealing withon a day and are now a few weeks old and completely shot. Absolutely trash. Worst bearings I've ever used. Beyond junk. Review 5: rating 5.0. Make sure to lick up brand and number and it should fit perfectly Fit my LG Tromm WM2277HB my husband did a fix it your self saved us $ hundreds. It takes a while to take apart and put back together but well worth the price. Review 6: rating 5.0. Works on LG from load Worked perfectly on my LG washing machine. LG wanted to charge me $500 to replace the bearings. Hubby watched a YouTube video and had no prior experience fixing a washing machine. Turned out great and washing machine runs so quiet and smooth now. Will never buy LG again though. Glad we found this product. Review 7: rating 5.0. Tough job to do, but well worth it with quality bearings like these! These worked very well as a replacement for our LG WM2101HW front loading clothes washing rocket ship!
BIG NOTES ;
-Wear gloves and stop hitting your knuckles so much.. it hurts!

-These bearings are a beast to remove and reinstall! When you think you cant remove them, hit it harder to knock the old ones out! Get yourself a drift or solid steel rod to more easily hammer out the old bearings and m... Review 8: rating 5.0. Big difference once installed This project was much like baseball.....hours of boredom and seconds of excitement. The project to disassemble the washer took several hours on a Saturday, but a little of no time to replace the bearings and seal....then some time to put it all back together and test.

No parts left over and no leaks, so it looks like I did it correctly. The icing on the cake is.... NO MORE ROARING FROM THE LAUNDRY ROOM. Review 9: rating 5.0. Perfect fit in an LG wm2240cw front loader The bearing and seals fit my LG front loader wm2240cw perfectly. Made my 8 year old machine like new again. You'll need a Phillips screwdriver, 10mm and 12 mm wrenches and sockets to access the tub then a 2.5lb hammer with a long punch/drift to knock out and install the actual bearings. I also replaced the inlet solenoids and supply hoses for good measure all Amazon choice recommend all told about $85 to renew my machine Review 10: rating 1.0. Bearing starting to go out Installed in February we are in June now washer is really really loud didn’t last at all Review 11: rating 3.0. Only lasted 3 months Bearing replacement on 13 year old LG Washer:

Well installing a new drum bearing in your LG HE washer is no small project, but if you are mechanically inclined it shouldn't be too bad. It took me a few hours to get the washer disassembled to the point where you remove the drum. 30 minute to pound out the bearing, and a couple of hours to reassemble.
Recommendations:
Wear mechanics gloves to protect your hands. Many sharp edges could result... Review 12: rating 1.0. Did not last. Bought this in February and I have to change it. Lasted at most a month. Review 13: rating 1.0. Cheap The product served its purpose. I only give 3 stars for easy to install, but that’s not really the products fault. All said and done, the washing machine works like new.

Update: Bearings lasted about 3 months before completely falling apart. Now I have to go through this process all over again, which I am not happy about. Review 14: rating 5.0. Perfect fit. After checking on the replacement cost for my washer and dryer, I decided to give replacing the bearings a go even if it was clearly a daunting task. Taking out the old bearings was a bear since it was rusted, split in two and seemed like welded onto the drum and the shaft. With the help of Dremel I was able to carefully take out the old bearings and these fit perfectly. My washer now works perfectly and will probably last another 10 years. Review 15: rating 1.0. UPDATE 10/17/19: STAY AWAY!!!! THESE ARE CRAP LATEST UPDATE: 10/17/19 - The bearings are SHOT! My washing machine is as loud as they were before the replacement. You would think that a jet fighter is taking off in my utility room. This company should be pulled from the Amazon list of seller. Simply terrible. Period. 5 hours of work for a waste of time. Buy quality and pass on this junk.

UPDATE: One must seriously question the quality of these bearings. I am very s...

reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. Love Amazon's Prices I purchased this filter from LG for nearly $60.00!! I came to Amazon to try and find a better deal. Boy did I found a great deal! The same filter for $20 + less! It was the same OEM filter that LG sold to me for a lot more. Thank you Amazon for helping me save $$$. Review 2: rating 5.0. Perfect My local Home Depot is over 50 miles away round trip. Very nice to get the exact replacement part via UPS. The filter arrived on time and works perfect. I orderd two to make sure I have one when needed. Review 3: rating 5.0. Compact This filter is small and was very easy to install. It was also a good price vs shopping elsewhere. Arrived when expected. Review 4: rating 5.0. Works great, keeps water tasting great We drink SO much more water now that we have this refrigerator. Everybody I ever knew with a fridge with a water dispenser always complained that the water/ice tasted bad. Now I wonder how many of them actually change the filters because our water tastes great. I change the filter when the fridge alerts me that it's time.

The only thing I don't like about these filters is the price (eek!) and the actual process for changing the filter... Review 5: rating 5.0. Great Product and Service We bought a new fridge and bought the filter that go with it. We received it when we were told it would be delivered and was easy to install. Review 6: rating 5.0. Five Stars Exactly what I needed and speedy delivery. Review 7: rating 5.0. Five Stars Product was exactly what I expected and delivered on time. Review 8: rating 5.0. Five Stars Arrived quickly And is original LG. What more can I say? Review 9: rating 5.0. GOOD PRICE, GREAT SERVICE EXACT FIT ,ARRIVED FAST,GOOD PRICE,GREAT SERVICE!!!! Review 10: rating 5.0. Cost Is the Only Real Factor and This Is a Bargain Reviewing this product is a bit difficult in that my LG refrigerator requires it. Consequently I will focus on the only factor that matters--cost! You can buy this directly from the manufacturer, but they charge significantly more. So there is definitely a savings. Your savings is even greater if you purchase the 3-pack currently offered through amazon.com.

A third option would be to purchase the aftermarket replacement f... Review 11: rating 5.0. Five Stars excellent service and product as described Review 12: rating 3.0. Expensive and exploring alternate choices! A rather expensive item to replace every six months if it's your sole source of water filtration. However, for my refrigerator's ice maker/water unit and drinking water at the kitchen sink I have installed a two stage water filter mounted in the basement ceiling. This unit does most of the work and is rated to process 1600 gallons of water. The LG unit has similar quality specifications and therefore having a substantial longer use life.
That has never happened before. Did we get a poor product? If this is the case, we want our money refunded or another filter at no charge. Review 14: rating 2.0. Same old same old .. Not much of a change in water taste .. Not much of a difference over all Review 15: rating 1.0. Works perfectly and I am very pleased. And the cost is awesome compared to the ... Works perfectly and I am very pleased. And the cost is awesome compared to the name brand!!! I'll buy it again! Review 16: rating 1.0. Defective Product Product leaked all over my fridge and was defective. I went o Home Depot and bought a 2 pack of the HD brand for the same price as the 1 unit! I have returned the unit and hope I get my refund! Review 17: rating 5.0. Glad to be able to get the original filter Glad to be able to get the original filter. Other companies sell cheaper compatable filters, but they are actually not certified for both NSF/ANSI standards 42 and 53. The substitute filters are only certified to standard 42, and not 53. The 53 Certification tests for removal of toxins like Arsenic and a number of others.
persona: This customer prioritizes functional performance and consistent water quality, expecting immediate and lasting effectiveness from filtration products, and is likely to switch brands or products if initial results fail to meet basic expectations.
reference_output: rating 2.0. Water tasted like it came straight from tap Bought 2 of these to have on hand.  First filter didn't work at all.  Water tasted like it came straight from tap.  Changed out after a week with second filter. Second filter worked a month and a half before water began to taste like tap water.

Now for the true test do they fit. Whoa, perfect fit, thank you for the fast delivery and true description of your product. Review 13: rating 5.0. These knobs were the perfect replacement, and at a good price. I ended up putting all 5 on the stove and put the 4 old unbroken ones into the box they came in just in case my kids broke another one I would have spares.

If they last longer, all the better. My only concern is the exterior, cheap pot metal, but that is the same for the OEM. reference_output: rating 5.0. These knobs are better than the Samsung original knobs The knobs were a great replacement. More sturdy than the originals. My wife has gone without knobs for several months. One day I tried to search and find these. I didn’t have the exact model number I needed. These looked similar. When they arrived, it wasn’t an exact match but my wife felt they looked better than the plastic originals that break easily. These are heavy duty. Definitely better than the originals. My wife decided to replace all the knobs on the Samsung Stove with these knobs. They are better built and more sturdy. My wife was very happy. She said,” It’s nice not to have to struggle to turn on the stove any more!!” These knobs definitely solved our problem and made 500% better than the originals. Samsung should be ashamed of themselves for using such cheap knobs. The stove should’ve come with these replacement knobs.

Review 1: rating 5.0. No running around Everything we needed in one spot and 1/2 the price of the box store. Quality was great as well. Review 2: rating 4.0. At half the price of Best Buy, this works At half the price of Best Buy, this works. Buyer beware, does NOT come with a supply line Reducer. Technician charged $15.00 for that item! Review 3: rating 5.0. Good quality alternative to buying the more expensive kit from Best Buy This kit came in very quickly as promised. The materials are of a very good quality. I am using this kit to replace old existing hoses, and install a new Samsung dishwasher. Other reviews referenced the supply line reducer, I also purchased the one from Insinkerator. Review 4: rating 5.0. Great kit for the money Great kit for the money. It came with everything in the picture and I didn't end up needing all of the parts. All parts were high quality and the kit was significantly cheaper than anything else I could find. I ended up not being able to use the water line because my dishwasher is not right next to the sink so it was too short, but that's my fault for not measuring beforehand. Happy with the purchase. Review 5: rating 1.0. One Star Wire gauge not sufficient for appliance. Don't buy. Review 6: rating 1.0. All 6 water supply lines that came leaked and had ... Don't buy this product unless you only need the power cord. Review 7: rating 5.0. Cheaper than the store alternative I bought a new dishwasher and needed new connections for it. The plug is a right angle plug which could cause an issue if the dishwasher and garbage disposal use a split single gang outlet. Review 20: rating 4.0. Great kit but keen eye needed! rating 4.0. Includes different cord than what is shown in the product pictures... Positive: Includes everything needed to hook up a new dishwasher and I used everything; included bonus roll of PTFE tape.

persona: This customer prioritizes cost-effective, reliable replacement parts for home appliances, values quick shipping and straightforward installation, and is comfortable performing DIY repairs, often choosing affordable alternatives to professional services or expensive OEM parts.
reference_output:
rating 5.0. Great replacement kit for the money. See my other review regarding replacement of the heating coil. For the record, never go through the effort of opening up a Samsung front load dryer without replacing the heating coil. This item will almost always fail on a near annual basis. It’s like going through the work of replacing a clutch and not replacing the $20 throw out bearing. But that’s another story.

This dryer rebuild kit is awesome. Comes with all 4 drum rollers, the idler pulley and a new belt. I was doing my annual heating coil replacement service and noticed the idler pulley was showing signs or wear and also noticed one of the drum rollers was not spinning freely so I ordered this service kit. All parts installed easily since I was already disassembled for the heating coil.

The dryer has been in service for about three months with no issues. We run about 4 loads per week. If the unit fails prematurely due to these replacement parts I will come back and update this review.

Good Luck.

persona: This customer prioritizes effective performance, large capacity, and ease of use in a humidifier, seeking a reliable solution for maintaining consistent humidity in spacious areas without frequent refills or excessive noise.
reference_output: rating 4.0. Keeping humidity comfortable Moved into a new Condo and when the  temperature went down so did the humidity. Wanted a unit that would treat a large area and that would not need to be filled several times a day. This unit is perfect. It holds 6 gallons and although it is a large unit, that has not been a problem. It is VERY easy to refill and on fan speed F1 it is acceptably quite. It is situated next to my chair and does not interfere with hearing the TV. The F2 fan speed is a little louder but is perfect for running overnight and if needed would still be tolerable. The F3 speed is loud. Somone commented that it was like a vacuum cleaner and that is accurate but again if needed it would put out humidity. So far the humidity gauge works fine (plus or minus 1 degree) and refilling is needed everyother day or so depending on the humidity levels. Definitely happy with this purchase.

the belt and new tensioner are a lifesaver. that s very much appreciated.

this is GREAT KIT Review 5: rating 4.0. Worked great These work great and were relatively easy to install. You'll need a 14mm socket, 10mm box wrench and a phillips screwdriver or drill bit. Also I don't like how small the grooves are on the belt compared to the original one (in the pic the one on the left is the new one and the one on the right is the original). If the or... Review 6: rating 1.0. Worked great for 7 weeks!! Went through all the work to replace these parts in our LG dryer and it worked great, nice and quiet for about 7 weeks. And of course it's past the return date. Just pay the extra and get the LG brand parts! Review 7: rating 4.0. Good value My 14 year old LG dryer started making a terrible noise. I watched a few Youtube videos to diagnose the problem, but it didn't seem worth repairing because the manufacturer's replacement parts were quite expensive...I could almost buy a new dryer for the cost of the replacement parts. I'm glad I found this very reasonably priced kit. The repair was simple with the help of a Youtube video and my dryer is much more quiet. Four stars vs five stars simply because the quality o... Review 8: rating 2.0. OEM rollers needed for my dryer The rollers were very hard and loud. I went with OEM instead as there was a huge difference. Also you need to use the old roller washers. The washer with these rollers are too small. Belt fit OK and the tensioner were OK although the original tension pulley is brass while this is steel. Review 9: rating 5.0. THUMP, THUMP THUMP is GONE! Turns out that TWO of the rollers in my LG were frozen, wouldn't rotate at all... the drum would barely roll when trying to spin it empty. One roller was frozen so long as to have worn a flat spot on the rubber. This kit was complete and replaced all they typical wear out parts. No way I would have just replaced the two failed rollers, when one of the currently working rollers or the idler, or the old belt could fail at any time; nice to have everything in... Review 10: rating 5.0. Replaced on LG Dryer "TROMM" DLE5977S - Worked Great My mother was going to call over a appliance repairman that would have been around $200. Instead.. I came over, and opened her Dryer to find a bunch of horribly damaged wheel bearings, a pulley with rust damage, and a belt that was frayed, and loose.

I got to work pulling power, opening the dryer from the back, wiped with a cloth to break loose the lint/dust, then vacuuming out all the dust crap, I cleaned the rust, repl... Review 11: rating 3.0. Skunk Smell The belt is causing a terrible odor (smells like a skunk) after installation and going through 2 drying cycles. After removing the replacement belt and installing the original belt back on, the smell went away. I was reading another comment to figure out what was causing the smell and the commenter was correct, the belt is the issue. The wheels and springs are perfectly fine. Review 12: rating 2.0. New Belt Broke Rollers and pulley installed just fine, the new belt snapped within 45 seconds of the dryer starting. As it was mainly the rollers which were bad, I just put the old belt back on for now, but super frustrating to have to tear the dryer apart twice. Review 13: rating 5.0. This is simply a great replacement product for the noise it is replacing The noise coming from our dryer was not as bad as some of them I've heard online, but it was bad enough to disturb the "peace and tranquility" of our household. The only downside to this produc... Review 14: rating 3.0. Not every part is quality...... The price of the kit is awesome.

Soooooo I was dumbfounded when I did the install and had a fast knocking sound that was annoying.
Took it apart and notice 1 wheel had a slight wobble so I put the best ORIGINAL wheel in it's place and assemble the unit again.
This time I still had the noise but only half as loud.
After running the unit with the front of... Review 15: rating 1.0. Belt broke After 4 loads the belt broke and the whole unit had to be taken apart again ughhhh!!!. Review 16: rating 2.0. 8 months and the roller is making noise again. The original factory roller lasted 10+ years. The replacement is wearing out after less than 10 months. Review 17: rating 3.0. The quality of the parts seemed good Wrong bracket and spring for tension pulley was able to make old bracket and spring work Review 18: rating 5.0. great product Our dryer made sooo much noise that we were willing to get rid of it and buy a new one. Luckily I had not thrown away the original rollers and managed to reinstall a couple of those that still seemed ok. persona: This customer prioritizes functional reliability and precise fitment in replacement parts, is willing to troubleshoot and adapt without instructions, and values performance improvements such as quieter operation and seamless integration, often opting for comprehensive kits despite the need for DIY adjustments.
reference_output:
rating 2.0. DONT INSTALL THE BELT! Purchased May 2022 for the rollers and drum getting torn up on my LG dryer. Replaced the whole drum and rollers with these upgraded ones. Came with a tensioner and belt and I figured hey why not these aren't easy to get to and they got 4-5 years of wear n tear. The dryer was so quiet we were amazed! Honestly think it was quieter than when it was new!

Fast Forward to December 2022 and im tearing back into it to replace that cheap belt they sent. Told myself when I was putting it in the belt felt a little cheap/cheesy and I'm gonna regret it. Didn't see any reviews knocking the belt until now that i search for it by keyword. Ah well live and learn....

reviews:
Review 1: rating 3.0. I switched from Melita because I didn't like using their plastic cone I switched from Melita because I didn't like using their plastic cone. The Hario filters have been on the expensive side. I find the recent price hike indefensible. Will experiment with other filtering material. Review 2: rating 5.0. Excellent product Very good quality, so much so I hate to throw them away. After my coffee is brewed, I rinse out the filter carefully with warm water and let it dry; it's then ready for my next cup. Like fine wine, I have found it improves with age. When new, I think the coffee flows through a bit too quickly, by the second or third run it seems to clog slightly or otherwise tighten up a bit and filters slower, anyway, it works perfectly for my taste. Review 3: rating 4.0. Works Works well with the Hario. Review 4: rating 1.0. May be dangerous because the water small so bad after wetting the filter. I always wet the paper filter before I put in the ground coffee. One day, I happened to smell the water before I dumped it out. The smell of the water after wetting this Hario filter was so bad and I simply could not continue to use this Hario filters. I do not know that kind of chemical had contaminated these Hario filters. (Maybe this only happened on the package that I purchased.) Since the Fukushima nuc... Review 5: rating 1.0. Just cannot wash the flavor out of these filters :( Even after running hot water through these filters, I still get a taste of cardboard, campfire, or cigarette. Disgusting, and ruins my coffee. Review 6: rating 5.0. Part of my delicious pourover coffee setup I am of the inclination that there is no taste able difference between brown and white paper filters. The bleaching process does not remove anything, it only colors (via oxidation) the paper product. That said, these filters are perfectly adequate for our Hario V60 pourover glass dripper. Easy to use and economical too! Review 7: rating 5.0. great product We decided to try something new to make coffee - not happy with our French Press (too much sediment) and the Keurig is way too much waste with those cups. We love the ceramic one cup coffee maker with the filters. Makes good strong coffee! Review 8: rating 1.0. Probably not Hario brand filters......although the packaging looks the same. These are not the same quality as all the Hario #2 filters I have ordered from Amazon. They are bigger than my Hario dripper and bigger than the #2 Hario filters I currently have. I will be returning them. They have a tab on the edge, and the wrong color.

I returned this item and ordered from another seller. I received these and are of the same quality i have used for years. Review 9: rating 5.0. Perfect Filters for the Hario V60 These work perfectly with my V60 and Hario Kettle. I actually prefer this method of making a cup or two over the press pot method. Takes a little time to learn to do it right (pour small amounts of water into the MIDDLE of your grounds...avoid the sides!). But once you get the technique down, you'll be rewarded with an excellent cup of coffee. Review 10: rating 5.0. Love the Hario paper filters I chose this because I was looking for unbleached filters and these seemed to fit the bill. I love them. Review 11: rating 5.0. Thank goodness Amazon carries these hard to find filters for my Haro pour through What can I say? These are non-bleached filters for a pour through system such as the Hario coffee maker.

The Hario pour through system requires that the filters come to a point, like a cone (see the picture on the package). Most cofee filters do not come to a point, they are flat on the bottom like this one would be if you folded it up.

These are more expensive than regular #2 coff... Review 12: rating 3.0. Three Stars They changed the way they made these they are thicker now and the water pours through slower Review 13: rating 1.0. Don't waste your money Don't waste your money. Buy Chemex brand filters for just a few dollars more and get a better brew (even if you use the Chemex filters with your V60). Review 14: rating 3.0. Just as I expected from paper filters This produced the resulted coffee just as I expected from typical paper drip coffee. nothing more or less. It confirmed my preference of metal filters over paper filters, that paper filters takes out the essential oil of coffee, which translates to natural sweetness of the flavor profile. Review 15: rating 1.0. Too thick This filter is too thick and takes way too long to brew coffee... 15g coffee grounded to medium coarseness with 266g water takes almost 5 minutes!!!! Don't buy the Hario filters with tabs, they're thicker. Review 16: rating 5.0. Nice filters These filters work great with the Hario V60 cone. I have not had any problems with break through, and coffee comes out great! Review 17: rating 5.0. Great Filter! From what I can tell so far, these filters are top notch. I used 3 so far and not 1 speck of coffee grounds in my coffee.... Review 18: rating 1.0. The worst filters Terrible! Wetting before adding coffee produces a hole in the bottom. I had several cups of coffee ruined this way Review 19: rating 1.0. ... to hold up to the slow pour coffee we love. Too small to hold up to the slow pour coffee we love. Review 20: rating 2.0. Two Stars They are extremely thin and rip easily letting coffee grinds fill up your cup.
persona: This customer values accurate product compatibility, reliable delivery, and clear installation guidance, often relying on external resources like YouTube tutorials to complete replacements, and prioritizes functional performance over minor cosmetic differences.
reference_output: rating 3.0. As described, but not as desired I received these Hario 02 filters a week ahead of schedule from REIZ TRADING JAPAN.  They are exactly as pictured.  But as others have reported, they are not the same as Hario 02 filters I have bought before.  These are darker, with slightly different texture, and the addition of a tab at the top.  Yet the packaging and part number are exactly the same as previously purchased filters. And while I'm still a Hario V60 novice, like others have reported, these seem to produce a bit different results - not in a good way.  Curiously, Whole Foods still sells the old style.  I'm confused.  I'm happy to pay the higher price from Whole Foods to get the old style.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. Authentic whirlpool part Not much to say here - this was a direct OEM replacement for our dishwasher chopper blade.

NB the 'teeth' on the back of our original chopper had worn down and were not touching the 'teeth' on the motor so we replaced this chopper first. However, after replacement still food was still not being chopped. After investigation, we found that the 'teeth' on the motor had also worn down and so we also had to replace the motor assembly since the 10 year... Review 2: rating 5.0. Everyone can fix their dishwasher!!! Everyone can fix their dishwasher. Over time the bottom of the Kenmore or Whirlpool dishwasher with a chopper will start to clog or "slime" up. This is often evident by the failure of the dishes to rinse cleanly. The other way to tell is the load grinding noise at the start of the wash cycle. This is a key indicator that your chopper is either clogged or broken.

This is a very easy fix and I've changed mine twice. Follow the steps ... Review 3: rating 4.0. Seems fine so far It was great to have this available on amazon so I don't have to order through an unknown supplier. My dishwasher works so much better now that this part is fixed, it's like night and day. The dishes were never quite clean, even after pre-washing. and now I don't even have to pre wash my dishes any longer.
Only gave it a 4 because its design is no more robust than the original part, which was flimsy and broke after a few years. Review 4: rating 5.0. Fixed my Dishwasher My dishwasher wasn't working properly. It sounded like the pump was pumping water, but at a very slow speed. The last couple loads of dishes hadn't come clean and there was still some soap in the dispenser when the load was finished.

I was advised that my pump was bad and the new pump assembly was $165.00 for the part. I dug a bit more into the problem and discovered that my "Chopper Blade" had broken apart and the round screen was all gunked up with ... Review 5: rating 5.0. Best price and exact fit. Exact fit for our Kitchenaid although the original had four blades. Seems to work great and quieted down the growling noise. Review 6: rating 2.0. Same as original Good as original which was also plastic so not gonna last forever but just as good as original...easy install and works for a few years usually Review 7: rating 4.0. Problem solved Resolved the spray pressure problem and poorly cleaned dish problem in my Kenmore Ultra Quiet dishwasher. Replacement was very easy except for how to re-insert this chopper. I had to search for an installation video to see the trick with needle-nose pliers in order to install this new part. Review 8: rating 3.0. The price was really good on this part but that being said there is ... The price was really good on this part but that being said there is always a part of me that wishes that there could be improvement on design!? It is the same quality as the one that was broke.
a stopnut on one side and a squirt of a epoxy on the other ....REALLY!? I ended up replacing my dishwasher cuz This thing failed which allowed something to be let into the pump and broke the impeller. I am not going... Review 9: rating 3.0. Unnecessary part? Original part and I'm sure it will fit perfect, however I'm currently running my d/w without it due to the old chopper falling apart and hesitant to install it. The reason is it is just a such poor design (boo Whirlpool) that will inevitably clog rather sooner than later. It is not much of a chopper and solid pieces such as small seeds will be trapped by and stuck in the screen forever until you take it out and punch them out with a toothpick or the like. It is not ... Review 10: rating 1.0. Not the best. Blade was assembled in reverse and was not sharp at all. Sent back and got a refund. Review 11: rating 1.0. Dishwasher chopper blade A couple of times a year I would have to open and clean the original chopper, I only replaced my old one because a tine was broken off. When I got this new one I noticed that there is a gap between the blade and the grate. Old one had no gap, blade actually ground most stuff up. I didn't think much of it and threw the old one out. But now realize that the gap prevents small stuff from being ground and pushed through the grate, just clogs it now. So now requir... Review 12: rating 5.0. Works like new again My dishwasher wasn't cleaning anything on the top shelf and I didn't want to spend the $60 service charge for my home warranty so I whent to youtube and found a link to fix it. The screen was completely filled with old food and the plastic shaft was broken. The video was helpful in figuring out how to remove the final cover. No intuitive places to grab with needle nose pliers. Took about 30 minutes. Also from the video, I found out that I was missing the top ... Review 13: rating 1.0. Kitchenaid is the worst product ever! The seller and the replacement part is fine, I just can't express how much I hate my Kitchenaid Dishwasher enough to give anything it touches a positive review. My dog could lick dishes cleaner. If it hadn't cost $1200 and been completely customized to integrate into my kitchen cabinets I would have replaced it instead of continually trying to fix it. Review 14: rating 5.0. Solved the metal grinding noise coming from my Kenmore dishwasher. My Ken ore Elite was becoming quite noisy (metal grinding sounds) and when I took it apart the chopper blade looked normal. But I ordered a replacement just the same since it isn't an expensive part and the simple swap of the parts completely eliminated the excessive grinding noise. You can find videos online to disassemble your dishwasher and the whole repair job is less than 20 minutes. Review 15: rating 4.0. works good but still doesnt chop all the food works good but still doesnt chop all the food..........maybe the blade could be closer to the mesh that might help......chopper needs to be pulled and cleaned more than i like. Review 16: rating 5.0. Received four blade chopper, still works. In 2/2017 I received this part correctly labeled (Whirlpool 8268383) in a Whirlpool Factory Parts bag, sold by Amazon (not third party), but it contained the four blade chopper. It still fits exactly the same and is high quality, so if you receive a four blade chopper, don't worry and don't return it. Review 17: rating 1.0. Purchased this chopper blade to replace the one I had ... Purchased this chopper blade to replace the one I had for several years and that was still rust free. This blade started showing signs of rust within months of use.
Changed to one star as after 10 months of use the spring rusted and snapped in half. Review 18: rating 1.0. Spring rusted away in less than a year. These are not OEM quality. Mine was junk in a year. There were two major failures.

First the chopper blades don't ride on the screen so no scissor action on food particles. You shouldn't have to clean this part if it is functioning correctly. I did, so I tweaked the blades so that they would skim the screen. This requires a careful bit of bending because you want the whole blade to be skimming the screen. Worked great...

T...
persona: This customer prioritizes compatibility and performance reliability, especially for specific appliance models, and values straightforward functionality over features; they are willing to purchase based on proven fit and past positive experiences but remain cautious about long-term durability and may return to older, trusted alternatives if newer products underperform.
reference_output: rating 3.0. Not as good as original. My 10 year old chopper blade was better than this. I may still go back to old one. This new one has a large clearance between the blade and the sieve. So large food particles are likely to collect under the blade and block the sieve without getting ground up and pushed through. Also blades don't feel as sharp as old one.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. Perfect for Keurig-Mr Coffee Like many others, was looking for a way to use our newly purchased Keurig/Mr Coffee single-serving coffee maker without being tied to expensive K-Cups. This has been perfect. Easy to use, and easy to clean. I'd say a must-have if you own the Mr Coffee Keurig machine. Review 2: rating 5.0. Great product! This product does the trick. While the eckobrew is easier to place and clean, especially since I use a disposable filter in it.

I went to Lowes and bought the Hillman's rubber washer # 136493, which cost less than a $1 , and removed the washer over the needle and installed this washer first and then put back the old washer. Furthermore, I put the K-cup cling facing the Keurig machine. You can...
